**Thread menu items** (shown as ModalBottomSheet or PopupMenu on desktop):
```
'Search in conversation'  — Icon: search
'Disappearing messages'   — Icon: timer_outlined
  → on tap: show DisappearingMessagesSheet
'Connection mode'         — Icon: settings_ethernet
  → on tap: show ConnectionModeSheet
'View contact'            — Icon: person_outlined
'Export conversation'     — Icon: download_outlined
'Delete conversation'     — Icon: delete_outlined (error color)
```

**ConnectionModeSheet:**

The connection mode sheet presents five message security modes as a spectrum from maximum security to maximum speed. Each mode is a distinct combination of routing, encryption layers, and traffic shaping. The default is `Standard` — the right balance for most conversations.

```dart
enum MessageSecurityMode {
  maxSecurity,  // Mixnet routing + S&F + maximum cover
  reinforced,   // Standard mesh + extra hops + tighter jitter
  standard,     // Standard mesh routing (default)
  loSec,        // 1-2 relay hops, obfuscated
  direct,       // Peer-to-peer, no mesh routing
}
```

```
BottomSheet(
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20, 8, 20, 4),
      child: Text('Message security', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
    ),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20, 0, 20, 12),
      child: Text('Higher security adds latency. Lower security is faster.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ),

    // Maximum Security
    _SecurityModeTile(
      icon: Icons.security_outlined,
      iconColor: Color(0xFF7C3AED),  // purple
      title: 'Maximum security',
      subtitle: 'Mixnet routing. Messages may take seconds to arrive. '
        'Defeats timing analysis.',
      latencyHint: '1–10s',
      selected: room.securityMode == MessageSecurityMode.maxSecurity,
      onTap: () => _setMode(MessageSecurityMode.maxSecurity),
    ),

    // Reinforced
    _SecurityModeTile(
      icon: Icons.enhanced_encryption_outlined,
      iconColor: kBrand,
      title: 'Reinforced',
      subtitle: 'Extra routing hops. Tighter traffic shaping. '
        'Good for sensitive conversations.',
      latencyHint: '200–500ms',
      selected: room.securityMode == MessageSecurityMode.reinforced,
      onTap: () => _setMode(MessageSecurityMode.reinforced),
    ),

    // Standard (default)
    _SecurityModeTile(
      icon: Icons.hub_outlined,
      iconColor: kSecGreen,
      title: 'Standard',
      subtitle: 'Full mesh routing with cover traffic. '
        'The right balance for most conversations.',
      latencyHint: '<100ms',
      isDefault: true,
      selected: room.securityMode == MessageSecurityMode.standard,
      onTap: () => _setMode(MessageSecurityMode.standard),
    ),

    // LoSec
    _SecurityModeTile(
      icon: Icons.speed_outlined,
      iconColor: kSecAmber,
      title: 'Fast',
      subtitle: 'Shorter path through 1–2 relays. Fine for everyday use.',
      latencyHint: '<50ms',
      selected: room.securityMode == MessageSecurityMode.loSec,
      onTap: () => _confirmLoSec(),
    ),

    // Direct
    _SecurityModeTile(
      icon: Icons.warning_amber_outlined,
      iconColor: kSecRed,
      title: 'Direct',
      subtitle: 'No mesh routing. Your network location is visible.',
      latencyHint: 'Minimum',
      selected: room.securityMode == MessageSecurityMode.direct,
      onTap: () => _confirmDirect(),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),
  ]),
)
```

**`_SecurityModeTile` layout:**
```dart
ListTile(
  leading: Container(
    width: 40, height: 40,
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: iconColor.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
    child: Icon(icon, size: 20, color: iconColor),
  ),
  title: Row(children: [
    Text(title, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
    if (isDefault) ...[
      SizedBox(width: 6),
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 1),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
        child: Text('DEFAULT', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 9,
          color: kSecGreen, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)),
      ),
    ],
  ]),
  subtitle: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Text(subtitle, style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
      color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    SizedBox(height: 2),
    Text(latencyHint, style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
      color: colorScheme.outline)),
  ]),
  trailing: selected
    ? Icon(Icons.check, color: kBrand) : null,
  onTap: onTap,
)
```

**Mode properties (backend-enforced):**

| Mode | Routing | Encryption | Jitter | Cover traffic | Padding | Persistent indicator |
|------|---------|-----------|--------|---------------|---------|---------------------|
| Maximum | Mixnet (§5.25) + S&F preferred | 4-layer + mixnet Sphinx | 500ms batch window | Full | Yes | Purple chip: "Maximum security — slower delivery" |
| Reinforced | Standard mesh + minimum 3 hops | 4-layer | `High` (0–50ms) forced | Full | Yes | Blue chip: "Reinforced" |
| Standard | Standard mesh (§6.1) | 4-layer | Per §16.9.3 | Normal | Yes | None (default, no indicator) |
| Fast (LoSec) | 1–2 relay hops (§6.9) | WireGuard only | `High` (0–50ms) | Injected per §6.9.2 | Yes | Amber chip: "Fast mode" |
| Direct | Peer-to-peer (§6.9) | WireGuard only | 0ms | None | Yes | Red banner: "Direct — no mesh routing" |

**Mode applies per-conversation.** Different conversations can run at different security modes simultaneously. The node's mesh participation (routing, cover traffic, relay) continues normally regardless of per-conversation mode choices.

**Mode persistence:** The selected mode is stored in the conversation record and persists across sessions. Changing mode mid-conversation does not affect already-delivered messages — only new messages use the new mode.

**Mode change and in-flight messages:** Messages already queued in the traffic shaper when the mode changes use the mode that was active **at queue time** — the traffic shaper does not re-route in-flight frames. The mode change takes effect for the *next* message queued after the change is committed. This prevents a partially-processed message from being split across two security modes.

**Availability:** Maximum Security and Reinforced are always available. Standard is always available. Fast (LoSec) and Direct over network transports have the existing availability requirements from §6.9 (ambient traffic threshold, peer trust, mutual consent).

**Proximity transport override:** When the active transport is a proximity transport (Bluetooth, WiFi Direct, NFC, ultrasonic, USB/serial, same-segment Ethernet — see §6.9.5 Path A), the conversation automatically uses Direct mode without user action or confirmation. The security mode picker shows a disabled "Direct (Bluetooth)" or equivalent label with a check mark and a note: *"You're physically connected — direct is automatic."* The user can still manually select a higher-security mode (Standard, Reinforced, Maximum Security) over a proximity transport if they want mesh routing for operational reasons — but this is unusual and not the default.

Fast (LoSec) confirmation — inline chip replacing normal UI, NOT a modal:
```
// After selecting Fast, show amber chip in thread AppBar subtitle:
// "Fast mode  [×]"
// No blocking modal. Dismiss with [×] to return to Standard.
```

Maximum Security / Reinforced — inline chip, no confirmation needed (higher security never needs a warning):
```
// Maximum Security: purple chip in thread AppBar subtitle: "Maximum security — slower delivery"
// Reinforced: blue chip: "Reinforced"
// Neither is dismissible with [×] — tap the chip to reopen the security mode sheet.
```

Direct connection confirmation — FULL SCREEN modal dialog (not bottom sheet):
```
Dialog(
  // Cannot dismiss by tapping outside (barrierDismissible: false)
  child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(24),
    child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
      Icon(Icons.warning_rounded, size: 48, color: kSecRed),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Text('Direct connection', style: textTheme.headlineSmall.copyWith(
        color: kSecRed)),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text(
        'This bypasses the mesh entirely. Your network location is visible '
        'to the other person and to anyone monitoring your connection.\n\n'
        'No relay. No anonymization. No cover traffic.',
        style: textTheme.bodyMedium,
        textAlign: TextAlign.center,
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text(
        'Only use this when both parties are fully trusted and '
        'network privacy is not a concern.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        textAlign: TextAlign.center,
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 24),
      Row(children: [
        Expanded(child: OutlinedButton(
          onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
          child: Text('Cancel'),
        )),
        SizedBox(width: 12),
        Expanded(child: FilledButton(
          onPressed: () { Navigator.pop(context); _setMode(direct); },
          style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: kSecRed),
          child: Text('Enable direct mode'),
        )),
      ]),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

**DisappearingMessagesSheet:**
```
BottomSheet(
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20,16,20,4),
      child: Text('Disappearing messages', style: textTheme.titleMedium)),
    Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20,0,20,16),
      child: Text(
        'Messages delete after the set time. This reduces your local '
        'exposure but cannot prevent the recipient from saving content.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
    _DurationTile(label: 'Off', value: null),
    _DurationTile(label: '1 hour', value: Duration(hours: 1)),
    _DurationTile(label: '24 hours', value: Duration(hours: 24)),
    _DurationTile(label: '7 days', value: Duration(days: 7)),
    _DurationTile(label: '30 days', value: Duration(days: 30)),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
  ]),
)
```

**Body - message list:**

**Message entry animations:** New messages animate into the list — not instant-appear:
- **Sent messages:** slide up 20px + fade in from composer area, 200ms `Curves.easeOut`
- **Received messages:** scale from 0.95→1.0 + fade in, 150ms `Curves.easeOut`
- **Batch load (scrollback/sync):** no animation — instant insert to avoid jarring cascade
- Implementation: wrap each `MessageBubble` in an `AnimatedSwitcher` or use `AnimatedList` with `SlideTransition`/`FadeTransition`. `insertItem` triggers animation for individual new messages; `insertAllItems` with zero duration for batch loads.

**New messages pill:** When user has scrolled up >200px from bottom and new messages arrive:
```dart
// Positioned at bottom-center of message list, above composer
// SlideTransition: slides up from below + fades in (200ms easeOut)
// Shows: "↓ N new messages" with sender avatar for last message
// Tap: animateTo bottom (300ms easeOut), then dismiss
// Auto-dismiss: when user scrolls to bottom manually
// Appearance: pill shape (borderRadius: 999), brand color background,
//   white text, elevation: 2 for subtle shadow
// Max width: 200px, centered
```

**Typing indicator:** When remote peer is typing, show below last message:
```dart
// Three dots in a bubble (same shape as message bubble, but smaller)
// Dots animate: sequential bounce with 100ms stagger per dot
// Each dot: 6px circle, translates Y by -4px then back, 600ms loop
// Background: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest (same as received bubble)
// Shows sender avatar to left (same as message bubble layout)
// Appears with scale 0.9→1.0 + fade (150ms), disappears with fade (100ms)
```

```
ListView.builder(
  controller: _scrollController,
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8, horizontal: 8),
  itemCount: messages.length,
  itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
    final msg = messages[i];
    final showDateSeparator = i == 0 || _isDifferentDay(messages[i-1], msg);
    return Column(children: [
      if (showDateSeparator) _DateSeparator(msg.sentAt),
      MessageBubble(message: msg, ...),
    ]);
  },
)
```

**_DateSeparator:**
```
Center(child: Container(
  margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12),
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 4),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  ),
  child: Text(_formatDate(date),
    style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
))
```

**MessageBubble:**
```
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 2),
  child: Row(
    mainAxisAlignment: isMe ? MainAxisAlignment.end : MainAxisAlignment.start,
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,
    children: [
      if (!isMe) ...[
        MaskAvatar(size: small, mask: sender),  // 28px
        SizedBox(width: 6),
      ],
      Column(
        crossAxisAlignment: isMe ? CrossAxisAlignment.end : CrossAxisAlignment.start,
        children: [
          Container(
            constraints: BoxConstraints(maxWidth: _maxBubbleWidth(context)),
            // maxBubbleWidth = min(MediaQuery.width * 0.72, 320)
            padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: isMe ? colorScheme.primary : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.only(
                topLeft: Radius.circular(18),
                topRight: Radius.circular(18),
                bottomLeft: Radius.circular(isMe ? 18 : 4),
                bottomRight: Radius.circular(isMe ? 4 : 18),
              ),
            ),
            child: Text(
              message.body,
              style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary : colorScheme.onSurface,
              ),
            ),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 2),
          Row(
            mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
            children: [
              Text(_formatTime(message.sentAt),
                style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
                  color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontSize: 10)),
              if (isMe) ...[
                SizedBox(width: 3),
                _DeliveryIcon(status: message.deliveryStatus),
                // sending: circular spinner 10px
                // sent: single check Icon(Icons.check, size: 12)
                // delivered: double check Icon(Icons.done_all, size: 12)
                // read: double check in kBrand color
              ],
              if (connectionMode == ConnectionMode.loSec)
                Container(
                  margin: EdgeInsets.only(left: 4),
                  width: 6, height: 6,
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    color: kSecAmber, shape: BoxShape.circle),
                ),
            ],
          ),
        ],
      ),
      if (isMe) SizedBox(width: 6),
    ],
  ),
)
```

**ComposerBar:**
```
Container(
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    border: Border(top: BorderSide(color: colorScheme.outline.withValues(alpha: 0.15))),
    color: colorScheme.surface,
  ),
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(8, 8, 8, 8 + MediaQuery.of(context).viewInsets.bottom),
  child: SafeArea(
    top: false,
    child: Row(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.end,
      children: [
        IconButton(
          icon: Icon(Icons.add_circle_outline),
          onPressed: _showAttachmentOptions,
          tooltip: 'Attach',
        ),
        Expanded(
          child: TextField(
            controller: _textController,
            maxLines: 6,
            minLines: 1,
            decoration: InputDecoration(
              hintText: 'Message...',
              border: OutlineInputBorder(
                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(24),
                borderSide: BorderSide.none,
              ),
              contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
              filled: true,
              isDense: true,
            ),
            onChanged: (_) => setState(() {}),
          ),
        ),
        SizedBox(width: 4),
        if (_textController.text.trim().isEmpty)
          IconButton(
            icon: Icon(Icons.mic_outlined),
            onPressed: _startPTT,
            tooltip: 'Push to talk',
          )
        else
          IconButton(
            icon: Icon(Icons.send_rounded, color: colorScheme.primary),
            onPressed: _sendMessage,
            tooltip: 'Send',
          ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
)
```

**Send/mic button transition:** The send and mic buttons occupy the same position and cross-fade with a rotation:
```dart
AnimatedSwitcher(
  duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 200),
  transitionBuilder: (child, animation) => RotationTransition(
    turns: Tween(begin: 0.5, end: 1.0).animate(animation),
    child: FadeTransition(opacity: animation, child: child),
  ),
  child: hasText
    ? IconButton(key: ValueKey('send'), icon: Icon(Icons.send_rounded, color: colorScheme.primary), ...)
    : IconButton(key: ValueKey('mic'), icon: Icon(Icons.mic_outlined), ...),
)
```

**Voice recording UI (on long-press of mic button):**
- Mic button scales up 1.0→1.3 with a pulsing red circle behind it (opacity 0.3→0.6, 800ms loop)
- Recording duration counter appears to the left of the button: "0:03", `labelMedium`, `kSecRed`
- Slide left to cancel: the entire composer row shifts right to reveal "← Slide to cancel" text
- Release: recording stops, voice message appears as a waveform bubble in the thread
- Cancel (slide left >100px): recording discarded, haptic `lightImpact`, composer returns to normal

**Media bubble rendering (inside MessageBubble):**

When `message.attachments` is non-empty, media renders above the text body inside the bubble:

```dart
// Image attachment:
Hero(
  tag: 'media-${message.id}',
  child: GestureDetector(
    onTap: () => _openMediaViewer(message),
    child: ClipRRect(
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      child: SandboxedMediaView(
        attachment: attachment,
        maxWidth: _maxBubbleWidth(context),
        maxHeight: 240,
      ),
    ),
  ),
)

// Video attachment: SandboxedMediaView with play button overlay
// Voice message: waveform + play/pause + duration + speed selector
// File attachment: icon + filename + size + download button
```

**Voice message bubble:**
```dart
// Inside bubble, replaces text:
Row(children: [
  // Play/pause button: 32px, toggles between Icons.play_arrow / Icons.pause
  // Waveform: CustomPainter drawing normalized amplitudes as vertical bars
  //   Bar width: 2px, gap: 1px, height: 24px max
  //   Unplayed: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.4)
  //   Played: colorScheme.primary (for sent) or colorScheme.onSurface (for received)
  //   Playback position: animated left-to-right fill, synced to audio position
  // Duration: "0:12" at end, labelSmall
  // Speed: tap cycles 1×→1.5×→2×→0.5×→1×, shown as chip below waveform
])
```

Attachment options sheet (on _showAttachmentOptions tap):
```
ModalBottomSheet with:
  GridView 2 columns:
    [Camera]  Icon(Icons.camera_alt_outlined)  'Camera'
    [Gallery] Icon(Icons.photo_outlined)        'Gallery'
    [File]    Icon(Icons.attach_file_outlined)  'File'
    [Contact] Icon(Icons.person_outlined)       'Contact card'
```

**Body loading state:**
```
Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator())
```

**Body empty state:**
```dart
EmptyState(
  icon: Icons.waving_hand_outlined,
  title: 'No messages yet',
  body: 'Say hello!',
  compact: true,
)
```

**Message interactions:**

**Swipe-to-reply:** Swiping a bubble rightward (threshold 56px) reveals a `reply_rounded` icon and sets that message as the reply target. The composer shows a reply preview card above the text field. Cancel with ×.

```dart
// Reply preview card in composer
Container(
  margin: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(8, 0, 8, 4),
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 8, 8, 8),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
    border: Border(left: BorderSide(color: kBrand, width: 3)),
  ),
  child: Row(children: [
    Expanded(child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
      Text(repliedToSender, style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: kBrand)),
      Text(repliedToPreview, style: textTheme.bodySmall,
        maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
    ])),
    IconButton(
      icon: Icon(Icons.close, size: 18),
      onPressed: _clearReply,
      padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
      constraints: BoxConstraints(minWidth: 32, minHeight: 32),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Replied-to messages show an inline quote above the message body:
```dart
// Inside MessageBubble, before text body:
if (message.replyTo != null)
  Container(
    margin: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 6),
    padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(8, 6, 8, 6),
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: isMe
        ? colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.3)
        : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
      border: Border(left: BorderSide(
        color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary.withValues(alpha: 0.5) : kBrand,
        width: 3)),
    ),
    child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
      Text(message.replyTo!.senderName,
        style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
          color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary.withValues(alpha: 0.8) : kBrand)),
      Text(message.replyTo!.preview,
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary.withValues(alpha: 0.7) : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
    ]),
  ),
```

**Tap-and-hold on a message bubble** opens the message action sheet after 400ms:

```dart
showModalBottomSheet(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [

  // Reaction strip at top
  Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8, horizontal: 4),
    child: Row(mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center, children: [
      for (final emoji in ['👍', '❤️', '😂', '😮', '😢', '🙏'])
        GestureDetector(
          onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); messaging.addReaction(msg.id, emoji); },
          child: Container(
            margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4),
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(8),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: msg.myReaction == emoji
                ? kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.15)
                : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
              shape: BoxShape.circle),
            child: Text(emoji, style: TextStyle(fontSize: 22)),
          ),
        ),
      // Custom emoji picker button
      GestureDetector(
        onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _openEmojiPicker(msg.id); },
        child: Container(
          margin: EdgeInsets.only(left: 4),
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(8),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
            shape: BoxShape.circle),
          child: Icon(Icons.add_reaction_outlined, size: 22,
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        ),
      ),
    ]),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.reply_outlined),
    title: Text('Reply'),
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _setReply(msg); }),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.content_copy_outlined),
    title: Text('Copy'),
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); Clipboard.setData(ClipboardData(text: msg.body)); }),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.forward_outlined),
    title: Text('Forward'),
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _openForwardSheet(msg); }),
  if (msg.isFromMe) ...[
    ListTile(
      leading: Icon(Icons.edit_outlined),
      title: Text('Edit'),
      onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _openEditMode(msg); }),
    ListTile(
      leading: Icon(Icons.delete_outlined, color: colorScheme.error),
      title: Text('Delete', style: TextStyle(color: colorScheme.error)),
      onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _confirmDeleteMessage(msg); }),
  ],
  if (!msg.isFromMe) ...[
    ListTile(
      leading: Icon(Icons.flag_outlined, color: colorScheme.error),
      title: Text('Report', style: TextStyle(color: colorScheme.error)),
      onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _reportMessage(msg); }),
  ],
  SizedBox(height: 8),
]))
```

**Reactions display:** Reactions are shown below the bubble as a row of pill-shaped chips. Tapping a chip you have reacted to removes your reaction; tapping one you haven't adds it.

```dart
if (message.reactions.isNotEmpty)
  Wrap(
    spacing: 4,
    runSpacing: 4,
    children: message.reactions.entries.map((entry) {
      final isMe = entry.value.containsMe;
      return GestureDetector(
        onTap: () => messaging.toggleReaction(message.id, entry.key),
        child: Container(
          padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 3),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: isMe
              ? kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.15)
              : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
            border: isMe ? Border.all(color: kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.4)) : null,
          ),
          child: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
            Text(entry.key, style: TextStyle(fontSize: 13)),
            SizedBox(width: 3),
            Text('${entry.value.count}',
              style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
                color: isMe ? kBrand : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          ]),
        ),
      );
    }).toList(),
  )
```

**Message edit mode:** When editing, the composer replaces the standard input with an edit mode version:

```dart
// Edit mode composer header
Container(
  color: kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 8, 8),
  child: Row(children: [
    Icon(Icons.edit_outlined, size: 16, color: kBrand),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Expanded(child: Text('Editing message',
      style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: kBrand))),
    IconButton(
      icon: Icon(Icons.close, size: 18),
      onPressed: _cancelEdit,
      padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
      constraints: BoxConstraints(minWidth: 32, minHeight: 32),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Edited messages show an "(edited)" suffix in `labelSmall` weight next to their timestamp.

**Message delete confirmation:**
```dart
AlertDialog(
  title: Text('Delete message?'),
  content: Text(
    'This removes the message from your view. '
    'The recipient may already have seen it.'),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context), child: Text('Cancel')),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: () { Navigator.pop(context); messaging.deleteMessage(msg.id); },
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: colorScheme.error),
      child: Text('Delete')),
  ],
)
```

**Message forwarding sheet (`_openForwardSheet`):**
```dart
// Shows a contact/conversation picker
showModalBottomSheet(
  isScrollControlled: true,
  child: DraggableScrollableSheet(
    expand: false,
    initialChildSize: 0.6,
    child: Column(children: [
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 4, 16, 8),
        child: Text('Forward to', style: textTheme.titleMedium)),
      TextField(
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search),
          hintText: 'Search contacts',
          isDense: true),
        onChanged: _filterForwardTargets),
      Expanded(child: ListView.builder(
        itemCount: forwardTargets.length,
        itemBuilder: (ctx, i) => ListTile(
          leading: _ContactAvatar(peer: forwardTargets[i]),
          title: Text(forwardTargets[i].resolvedName),
          onTap: () {
            Navigator.pop(ctx);
            messaging.forwardMessage(msg.id, forwardTargets[i].peerId);
          }),
      )),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

**Voice note recording (PTT):**

When the user taps the microphone icon (visible when composer is empty), it enters recording mode:

```dart
// Recording state shows in place of composer
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 12),
  child: Row(children: [
    // Slide to cancel hint
    Row(children: [
      Icon(Icons.chevron_left, size: 18, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      Text('Slide to cancel',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ]),
    Spacer(),
    // Duration counter
    Text(_formatRecordingDuration(duration),
      style: textTheme.titleSmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.error)),
    SizedBox(width: 12),
    // Animated recording indicator
    _RecordingPulse(color: colorScheme.error),
    SizedBox(width: 12),
    // Locked recording icon (hold mic to start, release to send, hold+slide left to cancel)
    GestureDetector(
      onLongPressEnd: (_) => _sendVoiceNote(),
      child: Container(
        width: 48, height: 48,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.error,
          shape: BoxShape.circle),
        child: Icon(Icons.mic, color: Colors.white)),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Voice notes are displayed as a compact playback tile within the message bubble:
```dart
Row(children: [
  // Play/pause button
  IconButton(
    icon: Icon(isPlaying ? Icons.pause_rounded : Icons.play_arrow_rounded),
    onPressed: _togglePlayback,
    color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary : colorScheme.primary),
  // Waveform visualization (simplified: fixed-height bars, animated position)
  Expanded(child: _WaveformView(
    progress: playbackProgress,
    color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary.withValues(alpha: 0.7) : colorScheme.primary)),
  SizedBox(width: 8),
  Text(_formatDuration(note.duration),
    style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
      color: isMe ? colorScheme.onPrimary.withValues(alpha: 0.7) : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
])
```

#### 22.5.3 CreateRoomScreen

**File**: `features/messaging/screens/create_room_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'New Conversation'`, leading `CloseButton`.

```
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('New Conversation'), leading: CloseButton()),
  body: Column(children: [
    // Search bar
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 0),
      child: TextField(
        autofocus: true,
        controller: _searchController,
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search),
          hintText: 'Search contacts...',
          border: OutlineInputBorder(
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999)),
          isDense: true,
        ),
        onChanged: _onSearch,
      ),
    ),

    // New group option (always visible)
    ListTile(
      leading: CircleAvatar(
        backgroundColor: colorScheme.primaryContainer,
        child: Icon(Icons.group_add_outlined, color: colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer),
      ),
      title: Text('New group conversation'),
      onTap: _createGroup,
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // Contacts list
    Expanded(
      child: _buildContactsList(),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Contact list item:
```
ListTile(
  leading: Stack(children: [
    MaskAvatar(size: medium),
    if (contact.isOnline) OnlineIndicator(),
  ]),
  title: Text(contact.displayName),
  subtitle: TrustBadge(level: contact.trustLevel, compact: false, showLabel: false),
  trailing: contact.isOnline
    ? Icon(Icons.circle, size: 10, color: kSecGreen)
    : null,
  onTap: () => _startConversation(contact),
)
```

Empty search state:
```
Center(child: Text('No contacts found',
  style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)))
```

#### 22.5.4 MessageRequestsScreen

**File**: `features/messaging/screens/message_requests_screen.dart`

Message requests are inbound conversations initiated by peers below Level 6 (untrusted — Levels 0–5). They do not appear in the main chat list until accepted. This is intentional: the main chat list should feel like a trusted space.

**AppBar**: `'Message requests'`.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('Message requests')),
  body: Column(children: [

    // Explanation
    Container(
      color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
      child: Text(
        'These are messages from people you\'ve paired with but haven\'t '
        'added to your chat list yet. Accepting moves them to your main '
        'conversations. Declining doesn\'t notify the sender.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ),

    Expanded(
      child: messaging.requests.isEmpty
        ? EmptyState(
            icon: Icons.mark_unread_chat_alt_outlined,
            title: 'No pending requests',
            body: 'Message requests from new contacts will appear here.',
          )
        : ListView.separated(
            padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 8),
            separatorBuilder: (_, __) => Divider(height: 1, indent: 72),
            itemCount: messaging.requests.length,
            itemBuilder: (ctx, i) => _MessageRequestTile(
              request: messaging.requests[i],
              onAccept: () => messaging.acceptRequest(messaging.requests[i].id),
              onDecline: () => messaging.declineRequest(messaging.requests[i].id),
              onViewContact: () => Navigator.push(ctx,
                MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) =>
                  ContactDetailScreen(peerId: messaging.requests[i].peerId))),
            ),
          ),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

**_MessageRequestTile:**
```dart
ListTile(
  contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
  leading: _ContactAvatar(peer: request.sender, size: 48),
  title: Text(request.sender.resolvedName, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
  subtitle: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    // Preview of first message
    Text(request.messagePreview,
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      maxLines: 2,
      overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    // Pairing context
    Row(children: [
      TrustBadge(level: request.sender.trustLevel, compact: true),
      SizedBox(width: 6),
      Text(
        'Paired ${_formatRelativeTime(request.sender.pairedAt)}',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontSize: 11)),
    ]),
  ]),
  // Accept / decline row below
  isThreeLine: true,
  trailing: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    OutlinedButton(
      onPressed: onDecline,
      style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12),
        minimumSize: Size(0, 36)),
      child: Text('Decline')),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: onAccept,
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12),
        minimumSize: Size(0, 36)),
      child: Text('Accept')),
  ]),
  onTap: () => Navigator.push(context,
    MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) =>
      PreviewThreadScreen(requestId: request.id))),
)
```

Accepting a request moves the conversation to the main chat list and fires a haptic success confirmation. A `SnackBar` confirms: *"Conversation added to your chat list."*

Declining fires a haptic medium impact. No notification is sent to the sender. A `SnackBar` confirms: *"Request declined."* with an Undo action (5-second timeout).

**Message request rate limits (DoS prevention):** Max **5 pending requests per sender** — additional requests from the same sender are silently dropped until existing requests are accepted or declined. Total pending request queue: max **200 requests**. Requests older than **30 days** are automatically expired and removed from the queue.

#### 22.5.5 ConversationSearchScreen

**File**: `features/messaging/screens/conversation_search_screen.dart`

Full-text search across conversation history. Opened from the search icon in ConversationListScreen.

**AppBar:**
```dart
AppBar(
  leading: BackButton(),
  title: TextField(
    controller: _searchController,
    autofocus: true,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      hintText: 'Search messages...',
      border: InputBorder.none,
      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
    ),
    onChanged: _onSearchChanged,
  ),
  actions: [
    if (_searchController.text.isNotEmpty)
      IconButton(
        icon: Icon(Icons.close),
        onPressed: () => setState(() { _searchController.clear(); _results = []; }),
      ),
  ],
)
```

**Body states:**

*Idle (no query):* Recent searches list, or `EmptyState(icon: Icons.search, title: 'Search your messages', body: 'Type to search across all conversations.', compact: true)` if no history.

*Searching:* `LinearProgressIndicator` below AppBar.

*Results:*
```dart
ListView.separated(
  itemCount: results.length,
  separatorBuilder: (_, __) => Divider(height: 1, indent: 72),
  itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
    final result = results[i];
    return ListTile(
      leading: _ContactAvatar(peer: result.peer, size: 40),
      title: Row(children: [
        Expanded(child: Text(result.peer.resolvedName, style: textTheme.titleSmall)),
        Text(_formatTimestamp(result.message.sentAt),
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontSize: 11)),
      ]),
      subtitle: _HighlightedText(
        text: result.message.body,
        query: _searchController.text,
        maxLines: 2,
      ),
      onTap: () => Navigator.push(ctx,
        MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) =>
          ThreadScreen(roomId: result.roomId, scrollToMessageId: result.message.id))),
    );
  },
)
```

`_HighlightedText` renders the message body with query matches highlighted in `kBrand` with slight background tint.

*No results:*
```dart
EmptyState(
  icon: Icons.search_off_outlined,
  title: 'No results',
  body: 'No messages match "${_searchController.text}".',
)
```

---

### 22.6 Communities Section

#### 22.6.1 CommunityListScreen

**File**: `features/communities/screens/community_list_screen.dart`

**AppBar:**
```
AppBar(
  leading: [mask avatar — same as Chat],
  title: Text('Garden'),
  actions: [
    IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.search), tooltip: 'Search communities', onPressed: _search),
    IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.add_outlined), tooltip: 'Join or create', onPressed: _openJoinCreate),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ],
)
```

**Body - loading:**
```
ListView of 4× shimmer tiles (same height as real tiles)
```

**Body - empty:**
```
Center(
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Icon(Icons.groups_outlined, size: 64, color: colorScheme.outline),
    SizedBox(height: 16),
    Text('No communities yet', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    Text('Join or create one to get started.',
      style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      textAlign: TextAlign.center),
    SizedBox(height: 24),
    FilledButton.icon(
      onPressed: _openJoinCreate,
      icon: Icon(Icons.add),
      label: Text('Join or create'),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

**Body - populated:**
```
RefreshIndicator(
  onRefresh: communities.load,
  child: ListView.builder(
    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4),
    itemCount: communities.list.length,
    itemBuilder: (ctx, i) => _CommunityTile(community: communities.list[i]),
  ),
)
```

**_CommunityTile:**
```
ListTile(
  contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 6),
  leading: ClipRRect(
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
    child: community.avatarUrl != null
      ? Image.network(community.avatarUrl!, width: 48, height: 48, fit: BoxFit.cover)
      : Container(
          width: 48, height: 48,
          color: kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
          child: Icon(Icons.groups_outlined, color: kBrand),
        ),
  ),
  title: Row(children: [
    Expanded(child: Text(community.name, style: textTheme.titleSmall,
      maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis)),
    _NetworkTypeBadge(type: community.networkType),
  ]),
  subtitle: Row(children: [
    Icon(Icons.people_outline, size: 14, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
    Text('${community.memberCount} members',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    if (community.unreadCount > 0) ...[
      Spacer(),
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.primary,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
        ),
        child: Text(community.unreadCount.toString(),
          style: TextStyle(fontSize: 11, color: colorScheme.onPrimary,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.w700)),
      ),
    ],
  ]),
  onTap: () => _openCommunity(context, community.id, isWide),
)
```

**_NetworkTypeBadge:**
```
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: _typeColor(type).withValues(alpha: 0.12),
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
    border: Border.all(color: _typeColor(type).withValues(alpha: 0.3)),
  ),
  child: Text(_typeLabel(type),
    style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10, color: _typeColor(type), fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
)

// Colors: Public=kBrand, Open=kSecGreen, Closed=kSecAmber, Private=kSecPurple
// Labels: 'Public', 'Open', 'Closed', 'Private'
```

#### 22.6.2 CommunityScreen (Desktop three-pane / mobile full-screen)

**Desktop layout** (width ≥ 1200):
```
Row(children: [
  // Left panel: channel list + navigation (240px wide)
  SizedBox(width: 240, child: _ChannelPanel(communityId: id)),
  VerticalDivider(width: 1),
  // Center: active channel messages (Expanded)
  Expanded(child: _ChannelView(channelId: activeChannelId)),
  VerticalDivider(width: 1),
  // Right panel: member list (200px)
  SizedBox(width: 200, child: _MemberPanel(communityId: id)),
])
```

**Mobile/Tablet layout**:
- Opens community screen showing channel list
- Tap channel → push ChannelScreen (thread-like)
- Members accessible via AppBar action button

**_ChannelPanel (left, 240px):**
```
Column(children: [
  // Community header
  Container(
    padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 16, 8, 16),
    child: Row(children: [
      Expanded(child: Text(community.name,
        style: textTheme.titleMedium.copyWith(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700),
        maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis)),
      IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.settings_outlined, size: 20),
        onPressed: communityAdmin ? _openCommunitySettings : null),
    ]),
  ),
  Divider(height: 1),
  // Channel list
  Expanded(
    child: ListView(children: [
      // Text channels
      _ChannelSectionHeader('Text Channels'),
      for (final ch in textChannels)
        _ChannelTile(channel: ch),
      // Voice channels
      _ChannelSectionHeader('Voice Channels'),
      for (final ch in voiceChannels)
        _ChannelTile(channel: ch),
      if (isAdmin)
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          leading: Icon(Icons.add, size: 18),
          title: Text('Add Channel', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          onTap: _addChannel,
        ),
    ]),
  ),
  Divider(height: 1),
  // Members button (mobile/tablet only — on desktop members are in right panel)
  if (!isDesktop)
    ListTile(
      dense: true,
      leading: Icon(Icons.people_outline, size: 20),
      title: Text('Members (${community.memberCount})',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall),
      onTap: _openMembers,
    ),
])
```

**_ChannelSectionHeader:**
```
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 16, 8, 4),
  child: Row(children: [
    Expanded(child: Text(title.toUpperCase(),
      style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
        color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
        fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
        letterSpacing: 0.8))),
  ]),
)
```

**_ChannelTile:**
```
ListTile(
  dense: true,
  contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 0),
  leading: Icon(Icons.tag, size: 18, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
  title: Text(channel.name,
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
      color: isActive ? colorScheme.onSurface : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
      fontWeight: isActive ? FontWeight.w600 : FontWeight.w400)),
  selected: isActive,
  selectedTileColor: colorScheme.primary.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
  trailing: channel.unread > 0
    ? Container(
        width: 8, height: 8,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.primary, shape: BoxShape.circle))
    : null,
  onTap: () => shell.selectChannel(channel.id),
)
```

**_ChannelView (center):**
Uses same message list + composer bar as ThreadScreen (§5.2). AppBar shows `#channel-name`. No peer avatar — community context.

**_MemberPanel (right, 200px):**
```
Column(children: [
  Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12,16,12,8),
    child: Text('Members',
      style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700))),
  Divider(height: 1),
  Expanded(
    child: ListView.builder(
      itemCount: members.length,
      itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
        final m = members[i];
        return ListTile(
          dense: true,
          contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 0),
          leading: Stack(children: [
            MaskAvatar(size: MaskAvatarSize.small),
            if (m.isOnline) OnlineIndicator(),
          ]),
          title: Text(m.displayName,
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: m.isOnline ? colorScheme.onSurface : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
            maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
          onTap: () => _openContact(m.peerId),
        );
      },
    ),
  ),
])
```

#### 22.6.3 JoinCreateCommunityScreen

**AppBar**: `'Join or Create'`, `CloseButton`.

```
DefaultTabController(length: 3,
  child: Scaffold(
    appBar: AppBar(
      title: Text('Join or Create'),
      leading: CloseButton(),
      bottom: TabBar(tabs: [
        Tab(text: 'Create'),
        Tab(text: 'Join by code'),
        Tab(text: 'Discover'),  // only visible in Normal/Elevated threat context
      ]),
    ),
    body: TabBarView(children: [
      _CreateTab(),
      _JoinTab(),
      _DiscoverTab(),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

**_CreateTab:**
```
SingleChildScrollView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
  child: Column(children: [
    TextField(labelText: 'Community name', hintText: 'e.g. Local Makers Group'),
    SizedBox(height: 16),
    TextField(labelText: 'Description (optional)',
      hintText: 'What is this community for?',
      maxLines: 3, minLines: 2),
    SizedBox(height: 16),
    Text('Type', style: sectionHeaderStyle),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    // Segmented button — 4 options
    SegmentedButton<NetworkType>(
      segments: [
        ButtonSegment(value: NetworkType.public, label: Text('Public')),
        ButtonSegment(value: NetworkType.open, label: Text('Open')),
        ButtonSegment(value: NetworkType.closed, label: Text('Closed')),
        ButtonSegment(value: NetworkType.private, label: Text('Private')),
      ],
      selected: {_selectedType},
      onSelectionChanged: (s) => setState(() => _selectedType = s.first),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    // Type description — changes based on selection
    Text(_typeDescription(_selectedType),
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    SizedBox(height: 24),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: _nameController.text.trim().isNotEmpty ? _create : null,
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
      child: Text('Create community'),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Type descriptions (plain language with real-world analogy):
- Public: "Like a public forum — anyone can find and join. *Good for: open communities, public events.*"
- Open: "People can ask to join; you approve them. *Good for: clubs, project teams, local groups.*"
- Closed: "Invite-only. Nobody can see who's in it. *Good for: friend groups, work teams.*"
- Private: "Maximum privacy. Admin-only invites. Hidden from search. *Good for: sensitive coordination, private circles.*"

**_JoinTab:** Same layout as ContactPairScreen with QR scanner + code entry tabs.

**_DiscoverTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 12, 16, 8),
    child: TextField(
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search),
        hintText: 'Search public communities...',
        border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999)),
        isDense: true,
      ),
    ),
  ),
  Expanded(child: _communitySearchResults()),
])
```

If threat context is Critical: show message:
```
Center(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  Icon(Icons.search_off_outlined, size: 48, color: colorScheme.outline),
  SizedBox(height: 12),
  Text('Discovery unavailable in Critical mode',
    style: textTheme.titleSmall, textAlign: TextAlign.center),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  Text('Change your threat context in Network settings to enable discovery.',
    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center),
]))
```

### 22.7 Files Section

#### 22.7.1 FilesScreen

**File**: `features/files/screens/files_screen.dart`

**AppBar:**

AppBar(
