```
      onPressed: _openSendSheet),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ],
  bottom: TabBar(tabs: [
    Tab(text: 'Transfers'),
    Tab(text: 'Storage'),
  ]),
)
```

#### 22.7.2 Transfers Tab

**Loading state:** 3× shimmer transfer tiles.

**Empty state:**
```
Center(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  Icon(Icons.folder_open_outlined, size: 64, color: colorScheme.outline),
  SizedBox(height: 16),
  Text('No transfers', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  Text('Tap the upload icon to send a file to a contact.',
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center),
]))
```

**Populated:**
```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 16),
  children: [
    if (activeTransfers.isNotEmpty) ...[
      SectionHeader('Active'),
      for (final t in activeTransfers) TransferTile(transfer: t, showCancel: true),
    ],
    if (completedTransfers.isNotEmpty) ...[
      SectionHeader('Completed'),
      for (final t in completedTransfers) TransferTile(transfer: t),
    ],
  ],
)
```

**TransferTile:**
```
ListTile(
  contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
  leading: Container(
    width: 44, height: 44,
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: colorScheme.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5),
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
    ),
    child: Icon(_iconForMimeType(transfer.mimeType), size: 24,
      color: colorScheme.primary),
  ),
  title: Text(transfer.filename, maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
    style: textTheme.titleSmall),
  subtitle: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    children: [
      SizedBox(height: 2),
      // Active transfer: progress bar + speed
      if (transfer.isActive) ...[
        LinearProgressIndicator(value: transfer.progress, minHeight: 4,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(2)),
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Row(children: [
          Text(_formatBytes(transfer.bytesTransferred) + ' / ' +
            _formatBytes(transfer.totalBytes),
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          Spacer(),
          Text(transfer.direction == TransferDirection.send ? '↑' : '↓',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text(_formatBytes(transfer.speedBps) + '/s',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ]),
      ] else
        Text(
          (transfer.direction == TransferDirection.send ? 'To: ' : 'From: ') +
          transfer.peerName + ' · ' + _formatBytes(transfer.totalBytes),
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ],
  ),
  trailing: transfer.isActive
    ? IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.cancel_outlined, size: 20),
        onPressed: () => files.cancelTransfer(transfer.id))
    : null,
  onTap: transfer.isActive ? null : _openFile,
)
```

#### 22.7.3 Storage Tab

**Loading:** shimmer storage card + shimmer file tiles.

**Empty:**
```
Center(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  Icon(Icons.cloud_outlined, size: 64, color: colorScheme.outline),
  SizedBox(height: 16),
  Text('No published files', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  Text('Publish files to the distributed mesh storage network.',
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center),
  SizedBox(height: 24),
  OutlinedButton.icon(
    onPressed: _publishFile,
    icon: Icon(Icons.publish_outlined),
    label: Text('Publish a file'),
  ),
]))
```

**Populated:**
```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [
    // Storage usage card
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Text('Storage', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        // Three-part segmented bar
        ClipRRect(
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
          child: Row(children: [
            // Used (my files)
            Flexible(flex: usedFlex, child: Container(height: 8, color: kBrand)),
            // Available
            Flexible(flex: availFlex, child: Container(height: 8,
              color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest)),
          ]),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Row(children: [
          _LegendDot(color: kBrand),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text('Used: ${_formatBytes(storage.used)}',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          SizedBox(width: 16),
          _LegendDot(color: kSecGreen),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text('Contributed: ${_formatBytes(storage.contributed)}',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall),
        ]),
      ]),
    )),
    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // Published files
    Row(children: [
      Text('My published files', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      Spacer(),
      TextButton.icon(
        onPressed: _publishFile,
        icon: Icon(Icons.add, size: 16),
        label: Text('Publish'),
      ),
    ]),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    for (final file in publishedFiles)
      _PublishedFileTile(file: file),
  ],
)
```

**_PublishedFileTile:**
```
Card(
  margin: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
  child: ListTile(
    contentPadding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 8, 8),
    leading: Container(
      width: 44, height: 44,
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: _secLevelColor(file.securityLevel).withValues(alpha: 0.12),
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
      child: Icon(_iconForMimeType(file.mimeType), size: 24,
        color: _secLevelColor(file.securityLevel)),
    ),
    title: Text(file.name, maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
      style: textTheme.titleSmall),
    subtitle: Column(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Row(children: [
          // Security level badge
          _SecLevelBadge(level: file.securityLevel),
          SizedBox(width: 8),
          // Stickiness dots
          _StickinessDots(score: file.stickinessScore),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Text(_formatBytes(file.size),
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ],
    ),
    trailing: PopupMenuButton(
      icon: Icon(Icons.more_vert, size: 20),
      itemBuilder: (ctx) => [
        PopupMenuItem(value: 'copy', child: Text('Copy link')),
        PopupMenuItem(value: 'stop',
          child: Text('Stop storing', style: TextStyle(color: colorScheme.error))),
      ],
      onSelected: (v) => v == 'copy' ? _copyLink(file) : _stopStoring(file),
    ),
  ),
)
```

**_StickinessDots:** Five dots (●○), filled dots = stickiness score (1–5). Dot size: 8px. Color: filled = kSecAmber, empty = colorScheme.outline. Spacing: 3px. Tooltip: stickiness label.

Stickiness labels:
- 1: "Ephemeral — exists only for this session"
- 2: "Low — stored on few nodes, easily removed"
- 3: "Moderate — stored across several nodes"
- 4: "High — widely distributed, hard to remove"
- 5: "Permanent — cannot be reliably removed"

**_SecLevelBadge:**
```
// Small badge showing security level name
// Colors: Level 0 = kBrand, 1 = gray, 2-4 = progressively more kSecGreen
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: _secLevelColor(level).withValues(alpha: 0.12),
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
  ),
  child: Text(_secLevelName(level),
    style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10, color: _secLevelColor(level),
      fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
)
// Level names: 'Public', 'Unlisted', 'Trust-gated', 'Group', 'Direct'
```

**PublishFileSheet** (ModalBottomSheet, isScrollControlled: true):
```
DraggableScrollableSheet(
  initialChildSize: 0.7,
  minChildSize: 0.5,
  maxChildSize: 0.95,
  child: Column(children: [
    // Drag handle (via BottomSheetTheme showDragHandle: true)
    Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20,8,20,0),
      child: Text('Publish file', style: textTheme.titleMedium)),

    // File picker area
    InkWell(
      onTap: _pickFile,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      child: Container(
        margin: EdgeInsets.all(20),
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 32),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          border: Border.all(color: colorScheme.outline.withValues(alpha: 0.3),
            style: BorderStyle.solid),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
        ),
        child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
          Icon(Icons.upload_file_outlined, size: 40, color: colorScheme.primary),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text('Tap to select a file', style: textTheme.bodyMedium),
        ]),
      ),
    ),

    if (_selectedFile != null) ...[
      // Selected file preview
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(_iconForMimeType(_selectedFile!.mimeType), size: 32),
        title: Text(_selectedFile!.name),
        subtitle: Text(_formatBytes(_selectedFile!.size)),
      ),
      Divider(height: 1),
    ],

    // Security level selector
    Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20,16,20,8),
      child: Text('Access level', style: sectionHeaderStyle)),
    for (final level in ContentSecurityLevel.values)
      RadioListTile<ContentSecurityLevel>(
        value: level,
        groupValue: _selectedLevel,
        onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _selectedLevel = v!),
        title: Text(_secLevelName(level)),
        subtitle: Text(_secLevelDescription(level)),
      ),

    // Stickiness preview
    if (_selectedFile != null && _selectedLevel != null)
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20, 16, 20, 0),
        child: Card(child: Padding(
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
          child: Row(children: [
            _StickinessDots(score: _computedStickiness),
            SizedBox(width: 12),
            Expanded(child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Text(_stickinessLabel(_computedStickiness),
                  style: textTheme.titleSmall),
                Text(_stickinessDescription(_computedStickiness),
                  style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                    color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
              ],
            )),
          ]),
        )),
      ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20,0,20,20),
      child: FilledButton(
        onPressed: _selectedFile != null ? _publish : null,
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
        child: Text('Publish'),
      ),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

Security level descriptions:
- Public: "Anyone with the link can access this file."
- Unlisted: "Only people you share the link with can access. Not indexed."
- Trust-gated: "Only contacts you trust can access."
- Group: "Only members of a specific group can access."
- Direct: "Only specific contacts you choose can access."

---

### 22.8 Contacts Section

#### 22.8.1 ContactListScreen

**File**: `features/contacts/screens/contact_list_screen.dart`

**AppBar:**
```
AppBar(
  title: Text('Contacts'),
  actions: [
    IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.person_add_outlined), tooltip: 'Add contact',
      onPressed: _openPair),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ],
)
```

**Persistent search bar** (below AppBar, always visible):
```
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 4),
  child: TextField(
    controller: _searchController,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      prefixIcon: Icon(Icons.search, size: 20),
      hintText: 'Search contacts...',
      border: OutlineInputBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
        borderSide: BorderSide.none),
      filled: true,
      isDense: true,
      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
      suffixIcon: _searchController.text.isNotEmpty
        ? IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.clear, size: 18),
            onPressed: _clearSearch)
        : null,
    ),
    onChanged: _onSearch,
  ),
)
```

**Loading:** 5× shimmer contact tiles.

**Empty (no contacts):**
```
Center(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  Icon(Icons.people_outline, size: 64, color: colorScheme.outline),
  SizedBox(height: 16),
  Text('No contacts yet', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  Text('Pair with someone to add them.',
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center),
  SizedBox(height: 24),
  FilledButton.icon(
    onPressed: _openPair,
    icon: Icon(Icons.person_add_outlined),
    label: Text('Add a contact'),
  ),
]))
```

**Empty search (contacts exist, search has no results):**
```
Center(child: Text('No contacts match "${_searchController.text}"',
  style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
  textAlign: TextAlign.center))
```

**Populated:**

Sorted: online first, then by trust level descending, then alphabetically.

```
ListView.builder(
  padding: EdgeInsets.only(top: 4, bottom: 16),
  itemCount: contacts.length,
  itemBuilder: (ctx, i) => _ContactTile(contact: contacts[i], ...),
)
```

**_ContactTile:**
```
ListTile(
  contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 4),
  leading: Stack(children: [
    MaskAvatar(name: contact.displayName, color: contact.avatarColor,
      size: MaskAvatarSize.medium),  // 40px
    if (contact.isOnline) OnlineIndicator(),
    // If peer has negative markers (Disavowed/Compromised):
    if (contact.hasNegativeMarkers)
      Positioned(top: 0, right: 0, child: Container(
        width: 12, height: 12,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: kSecPurple, shape: BoxShape.circle,
          border: Border.all(color: colorScheme.surface, width: 1.5)),
        child: Icon(Icons.warning, size: 8, color: Colors.white),
      )),
  ]),
  title: Text(contact.displayName,
    style: textTheme.titleSmall, maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
  subtitle: Row(children: [
    TrustBadge(level: contact.trustLevel, compact: false, showLabel: false),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Text(contact.isOnline ? 'Online' : _lastSeenText(contact.lastSeen),
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
        color: contact.isOnline ? kSecGreen : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
        fontSize: 11)),
  ]),
  selected: isWide && shell.selectedPeerId == contact.id,
  onTap: () => _openContact(context, contact.id, isWide),
)
```

Last seen text:
- Just now: "Online"
- < 1 hour: "X min ago"
- < 24 hours: "X hours ago"
- < 7 days: "Day name" (e.g. "Monday")
- Older: date string

#### 22.8.2 ContactDetailScreen

**File**: `features/contacts/screens/contact_detail_screen.dart`

**AppBar:** Contact display name. No icon in title. Action: `Icons.more_vert`.

More menu items:
- "View QR code" → shows this contact's QR (for re-sharing)
- "Block contact" → confirmation dialog
- "Remove contact" → confirmation dialog (error color)

**Body:**
```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // HERO CARD
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
      child: Column(children: [
        Stack(children: [
          MaskAvatar(size: MaskAvatarSize.large, ...),  // 64px
          if (contact.isOnline) Positioned(bottom: 2, right: 2,
            child: Container(width: 14, height: 14,
              decoration: BoxDecoration(color: kSecGreen, shape: BoxShape.circle,
                border: Border.all(color: colorScheme.surface, width: 2)))),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        Text(contact.displayName, style: textTheme.titleLarge),
        SizedBox(height: 6),
        TrustBadge(level: contact.trustLevel, compact: false, showLabel: true),
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Text(contact.isOnline ? 'Online' : _lastSeenText(contact.lastSeen),
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: contact.isOnline ? kSecGreen : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 12),

    // QUICK ACTIONS
    Row(children: [
      Expanded(child: _ActionButton(
        icon: Icons.chat_bubble_outline, label: 'Chat',
        onTap: () => _openConversation(context, contact))),
      SizedBox(width: 8),
      Expanded(child: _ActionButton(
        icon: Icons.folder_outlined, label: 'Files',
        onTap: () => _sendFile(context, contact))),
      SizedBox(width: 8),
      Expanded(child: _ActionButton(
        icon: Icons.call_outlined, label: 'Call',
        onTap: () => _startCall(context, contact))),
    ]),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // TRUST SECTION
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Text('Trust Level', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
        SizedBox(height: 12),

        // 8 trust level items as a segmented visual slider
        // NOT a Slider widget — a custom Row of 8 tappable chips
        _TrustLevelSelector(
          current: contact.trustLevel,
          onChanged: (level) => _setTrust(context, level),
        ),

        SizedBox(height: 12),

        // Mutual trust status
        if (contact.mutualTrustLevel != null)
          _MutualTrustInfo(
            myLevel: contact.trustLevel,
            theirLevel: contact.mutualTrustLevel!,
          ),

        SizedBox(height: 12),

        // TRUST METRICS — how this contact was discovered and paired
        Text('Trust History', style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 8),

        // Pairing method
        _MetricRow(
          icon: Icons.qr_code_2_outlined,
          label: 'Paired via',
          value: contact.pairingMethodLabel,
        ),

        // Trusted context boost (§4.8.3)
        if (contact.trustedContextBoost > 0)
          _MetricRow(
            icon: Icons.verified_outlined,
            label: 'Trust boost',
            value: '+${contact.trustedContextBoost} (${contact.trustedContextSource})',
            valueColor: kSecGreen,
          ),

        // Pairing transport
        if (contact.pairingTransport != null)
          _MetricRow(
            icon: Icons.swap_horiz_outlined,
            label: 'Transport',
            value: contact.pairingTransport!,
          ),

        // Safety number verification
        _MetricRow(
          icon: contact.safetyNumberVerified
            ? Icons.check_circle_outline
            : Icons.error_outline,
          label: 'Safety number',
          value: contact.safetyNumberVerified ? 'Verified' : 'Not verified',
          valueColor: contact.safetyNumberVerified ? kSecGreen : kSecAmber,
          onTap: () => _showSafetyNumber(context, contact),
        ),

        // When paired
        _MetricRow(
          icon: Icons.calendar_today_outlined,
          label: 'Paired on',
          value: _formatDate(contact.pairedAt),
        ),

        // Context annotation (user's note about why they paired)
        if (contact.contextAnnotation != null) ...[
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(10),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: colorScheme.surfaceVariant.withValues(alpha: 0.3),
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
            child: Row(children: [
              Icon(Icons.note_outlined, size: 14,
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
              SizedBox(width: 8),
              Expanded(child: Text(contact.contextAnnotation!,
                style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                  fontStyle: FontStyle.italic,
                  color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
            ]),
          ),
        ],
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // PROFILE SECTION — shows what profile tier this contact has shared
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Row(children: [
          Text('Profile', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          Spacer(),
          // Profile tier badge
          Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 3),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: _profileTierColor(contact).withValues(alpha: 0.12),
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
            child: Text(
              _profileTierLabel(contact),
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 11,
                color: _profileTierColor(contact),
                fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
          ),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        // Tagline — from whichever profile tier applies
        if (_activeTagline(contact) != null) ...[
          Text(_activeTagline(contact)!,
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
              fontStyle: FontStyle.italic)),
          SizedBox(height: 6),
        ],
        // Bio — from whichever profile tier applies
        if (_activeBio(contact) != null)
          Text(_activeBio(contact)!,
            style: textTheme.bodyMedium)
        else
          Text('No bio.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        // Contact hint — only if provided in paired profile
        if (contact.pairedProfile?.contactHint != null) ...[
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Row(children: [
            Icon(Icons.alternate_email_outlined, size: 14,
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
            SizedBox(width: 4),
            Expanded(child: Text(contact.pairedProfile!.contactHint!,
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
                fontFamily: 'monospace'))),
          ]),
        ],
        if (contact.trustLevel.value < 6) ...[
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text(
            'Elevate to Trusted (Level 6) to exchange private profiles.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
              fontStyle: FontStyle.italic)),
        ],
      ]),
    )),

    // MASK CONTEXT SECTION
    Card(child: ListTile(
      title: Text('Known as', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      subtitle: Text(contact.myMaskName ?? 'Default mask'),
      trailing: TextButton(onPressed: _changeMask, child: Text('Change')),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // VERIFICATION SECTION
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Row(children: [
          Text('Verification', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          Spacer(),
          if (contact.isVerifiedOutOfBand)
            Container(
              padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 3),
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
              child: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
                Icon(Icons.verified_outlined, size: 14, color: kSecGreen),
                SizedBox(width: 4),
                Text('Verified', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 11,
                  color: kSecGreen, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
              ]),
            ),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Text(
          contact.isVerifiedOutOfBand
            ? 'Verified out-of-band on ${_formatDate(contact.lastVerifiedAt!)}'
            : 'Not yet verified out-of-band. Key changes will require careful review.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        OutlinedButton(
          onPressed: () => _startVerification(context, contact),
          child: Text(contact.isVerifiedOutOfBand
            ? 'Re-verify'
            : 'Verify out-of-band'),
        ),
      ]),
    )),

    // RISK SIGNALS (only if present)
    if (contact.isDisavowed || contact.isCompromised) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Card(
        color: kSecPurple.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
          side: BorderSide(color: kSecPurple.withValues(alpha: 0.3))),
        child: Padding(
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
          child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
            Row(children: [
              Icon(Icons.warning_rounded, color: kSecPurple, size: 20),
              SizedBox(width: 8),
              Text('Risk signals', style: textTheme.titleSmall.copyWith(
                color: kSecPurple)),
            ]),
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            if (contact.isCompromised)
              Text('This peer has been permanently flagged as compromised.',
                style: textTheme.bodySmall),
            if (contact.isDisavowed && !contact.isCompromised)
              Text('This peer\'s device has been flagged by their trusted contacts.',
                style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          ]),
        ),
      ),
    ],

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // TECHNICAL DETAILS (collapsed by default)
    _ExpandableCard(
      title: 'Technical details',
      collapsed: true,
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        _KeyField(label: 'Peer ID', value: contact.peerId),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        _KeyField(label: 'Public key', value: contact.publicKey),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
          title: Text('Addresses known', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          trailing: Text('${contact.addressCount}',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ),
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
          title: Text('Paired via', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          trailing: Text(contact.pairingMethod ?? 'Unknown',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ),
      ]),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

**_ActionButton:**
```
OutlinedButton(
  onPressed: onTap,
  style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 12),
    minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 48),
    shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
  ),
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Icon(icon, size: 22),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    Text(label, style: textTheme.labelSmall),
  ]),
)
```

**_TrustLevelSelector:**

8 small circular trust chips in a row, scrollable if needed. Tapping sets that trust level. Current level has a border. A visible gap and thin divider separates Levels 0–5 ("Contacts") from Levels 6–8 ("Trusted") to reinforce the tier boundary.

**Confirmation dialogs on trust tier changes:**

Crossing the trusted tier boundary (5→6 or 6→5) triggers a confirmation dialog — casual taps must not silently share or revoke private profile access.

*Promoting to Level 6+:*
```
Dialog(
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Icon(Icons.shield_outlined, size: 40, color: kTrust6),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    Text('Trust [Name]?', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    Text(
      'This opens a private channel between you. '
      'Your private profile will be shared with them permanently — '
      'it cannot be recalled once sent.',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      textAlign: TextAlign.center,
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 20),
    Row(children: [
      Expanded(child: OutlinedButton(onPressed: cancel, child: Text('Cancel'))),
      SizedBox(width: 12),
      Expanded(child: FilledButton(onPressed: confirm,
        child: Text('Trust'))),
    ]),
  ]),
)
```

*Demoting from Level 6+ to 5 or below:*
```
Dialog(
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Icon(Icons.shield_outlined, size: 40, color: kSecAmber),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    Text('Remove trusted status?', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    Text(
      'This closes the private channel. They keep any profile data '
      'already shared — that cannot be undone. '
      'Future private updates will stop.',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      textAlign: TextAlign.center,
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 20),
    Row(children: [
      Expanded(child: OutlinedButton(onPressed: cancel, child: Text('Keep trusted'))),
      SizedBox(width: 12),
      Expanded(child: FilledButton(
        onPressed: confirm,
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: kSecAmber),
        child: Text('Remove'))),
    ]),
  ]),
)
```

Levels within the same tier (e.g. 6→7, 2→3) change without confirmation — the user is staying within a tier they already committed to.

```
SingleChildScrollView(
  scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
  child: Row(children: [
    for (final level in TrustLevel.values)
      GestureDetector(
        onTap: () => onChanged(level),
        child: Container(
          margin: EdgeInsets.only(right: 8),
          width: 36, height: 36,
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: level == current
              ? level.color.withValues(alpha: 0.2)
              : level.color.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
            shape: BoxShape.circle,
            border: Border.all(
              color: level == current ? level.color : Colors.transparent,
              width: 2),
          ),
          child: Tooltip(
            message: level.label,
            child: Center(child: Text(level.value.toString(),
              style: TextStyle(fontSize: 12, fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
                color: level.color))),
          ),
        ),
      ),
  ]),
)
```

Below the selector, show:
```
Text('${current.label} — ${_trustDescription(current)}',
  style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))
```

Trust descriptions (one sentence each):
- Unknown (0): "No relationship established."
- Public (1): "They made contact. No endorsement."
- Vouched (2): "Endorsed by someone you trust."
- Referenced (3): "Endorsed by someone you highly trust."
- Ally (4): "Endorsed by Inner Circle. Operational ally."
- Acquaintance (5): "Directly paired. Chat-accessible. No private channel."
- Trusted (6): "Private channel active. Profiles shared."
- Highly Trusted (7): "Near-maximum trust. Exit node capable."
- Inner Circle (8): "Maximum trust. Can vote on device compromise."

**_MutualTrustInfo:**
```
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
  ),
  child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Text('Mutual trust', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
    SizedBox(height: 6),
    Row(children: [
      Text('They trust you at: ', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
      TrustBadge(level: theirLevel, compact: true),
      SizedBox(width: 4),
      Text(theirLevel.label, style: textTheme.bodySmall),
    ]),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    if (myLevel.index >= 6 && theirLevel.index >= 6)
      Row(children: [
        Icon(Icons.check_circle_outline, size: 14, color: kSecGreen),
        SizedBox(width: 4),
        Text('Mutual trust active — profiles shared',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecGreen)),
      ])
    else if (myLevel.index >= 6 && theirLevel.index < 6)
      Row(children: [
        Icon(Icons.hourglass_empty_outlined, size: 14, color: kSecAmber),
        SizedBox(width: 4),
        Text('Pending — waiting for reciprocation',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecAmber)),
      ])
    else
      Text('Trust level too low for profile sharing.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
  ]),
)
```

**Profile tier helpers:**

```dart
// Which profile tier label to show in the profile card
String _profileTierLabel(Contact contact) {
  if (contact.trustLevel.value >= 6 && contact.privateProfile != null)
    return 'Private profile';
  if (contact.pairedProfile != null)
    return 'Paired profile';
  if (contact.publicProfile != null)
    return 'Public profile';
  return 'No profile';
}

// Corresponding color
Color _profileTierColor(Contact contact) {
  if (contact.trustLevel.value >= 6 && contact.privateProfile != null)
    return kSecGreen;
  if (contact.pairedProfile != null)
    return kBrand;
  if (contact.publicProfile != null)
    return colorScheme.secondary;
  return colorScheme.outline;
}

// Bio from whichever tier is active (public profile has no bio — only a tagline)
String? _activeBio(Contact contact) {
  if (contact.trustLevel.value >= 6 && contact.privateProfile?.bio != null)
    return contact.privateProfile!.bio;
  if (contact.pairedProfile?.bio != null)
    return contact.pairedProfile!.bio;
  return null;
}

// Tagline from whichever tier is active
String? _activeTagline(Contact contact) {
  if (contact.pairedProfile?.tagline != null)
    return contact.pairedProfile!.tagline;
  if (contact.publicProfile?.publicBio != null)  // public_bio = tagline
    return contact.publicProfile!.publicBio;
  return null;
}
```

#### 22.8.3 PairContactScreen (Add Contact)

**File**: `features/contacts/screens/pair_contact_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Add Contact'`, `CloseButton`.

```
DefaultTabController(length: 5,
  child: Scaffold(
    appBar: AppBar(
      title: Text('Add Contact'),
      leading: CloseButton(),
      bottom: TabBar(
        isScrollable: true,
        tabs: [
          Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.qr_code_scanner), text: 'QR Code'),
          Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.pin_outlined), text: 'Pairing Code'),
          Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.link_outlined), text: 'Link'),
          Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.bluetooth_outlined), text: 'Bluetooth'),
          Tab(icon: Icon(Icons.file_download_outlined), text: 'Import Key'),
        ],
      ),
    ),
    body: TabBarView(children: [
      _QRTab(),
      _PairingCodeTab(),
      _LinkTab(),
      _BluetoothTab(),
      _ImportKeyTab(),
    ]),

)
```

**Context annotation field** — persistent, shown at bottom of ALL tabs:
```
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(20, 0, 20, 20),
  child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Divider(height: 24),
    Text('How do you know this person? (optional)',
      style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    TextField(
      controller: _contextController,
      decoration: InputDecoration(

```

**_QRTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Expanded(child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(children: [
      // Show/Scan toggle
      SegmentedButton<QrMode>(
        segments: [
          ButtonSegment(value: QrMode.show, label: Text('Show my QR')),
          ButtonSegment(value: QrMode.scan, label: Text('Scan theirs')),
        ],
        selected: {_qrMode},
        onSelectionChanged: (s) => setState(() => _qrMode = s.first),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 20),

      // Show mode
      if (_qrMode == QrMode.show) ...[
        // Expiry selector
        DropdownButton<QrExpiry>(
          value: _expiry,
          isExpanded: true,
          items: [
            DropdownMenuItem(value: QrExpiry.s30, child: Text('30 seconds (rotating — most secure)')),
            DropdownMenuItem(value: QrExpiry.m5, child: Text('5 minutes')),
            DropdownMenuItem(value: QrExpiry.h1, child: Text('1 hour')),
            DropdownMenuItem(value: QrExpiry.h24, child: Text('24 hours')),
            DropdownMenuItem(value: QrExpiry.permanent, child: Text('Permanent (until key rotation)')),
          ],
          onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _expiry = v!),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 16),

        // QR code with countdown
        Stack(alignment: Alignment.center, children: [
          Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: Colors.white,
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
            child: QrImageView(
              data: _qrData,
              size: 200,
              eyeStyle: QrEyeStyle(eyeShape: QrEyeShape.square,
                color: colorScheme.primary),
            ),
          ),
          if (_expiry == QrExpiry.s30)
            Positioned(bottom: 8, child: _CountdownChip(seconds: _remainingSeconds)),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 12),

        // Threat info
        _qrThreatInfo(_expiry),
      ],

      // Scan mode
      if (_qrMode == QrMode.scan) ...[
        Expanded(child: ClipRRect(
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
          child: MobileScanner(
            controller: _scannerController,
            onDetect: _onQrDetected,
          ),
        )),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Text('Point the camera at the other person\'s QR code',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
          textAlign: TextAlign.center),
      ],
    ]),
  )),
  // Context annotation
  _ContextAnnotationSection(_contextController),
])
```

**_CountdownChip:**
```
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 4),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: Colors.black54,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999)),
  child: Text('Refreshes in ${seconds}s',
    style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12)),
)
```

**_qrThreatInfo:**
```
// Returns a Container with appropriate warning text based on expiry
// 30s/5min/1hr: no warning — just note
// 24hr: amber info chip: "Valid for 24 hours. Store the image securely."
// permanent: amber info chip: "Anyone with this image can initiate contact."
```

**_PairingCodeTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Expanded(child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center, children: [
      Text('Your pairing code', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      // Large code display
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 24, vertical: 16),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16)),
        child: Text(_pairingCode,
          style: TextStyle(fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 28,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.w700, letterSpacing: 6)),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      // Countdown
      Text('Expires in ${_minutesRemaining}:${_secondsStr}',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      // Copy button
      OutlinedButton.icon(
        onPressed: _copyCode,
        icon: Icon(Icons.copy_outlined, size: 18),
        label: Text('Copy code'),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 24),
      Divider(),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      // OR enter their code
      Text('Or enter their code:', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Row(children: [
        Expanded(child: TextField(
          controller: _theirCodeController,
          decoration: InputDecoration(
            hintText: 'XXXX-XXXX',
            labelText: 'Their pairing code',
          ),
          style: TextStyle(fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 18, letterSpacing: 4),
          inputFormatters: [_PairingCodeFormatter()],
          onSubmitted: (_) => _pairWithCode(),
        )),
        SizedBox(width: 12),
        FilledButton(onPressed: _pairWithCode, child: Text('Pair')),
      ]),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text('Safe for verbal exchange. Exercise caution on phone calls.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        textAlign: TextAlign.center),
    ]),
  )),
  _ContextAnnotationSection(_contextController),
])
```

**_LinkTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Expanded(child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(children: [
      // Warning banner — always shown for link share
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.1),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
          border: Border.all(color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.4))),
        child: Row(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Icon(Icons.info_outline, color: kSecAmber, size: 18),
          SizedBox(width: 8),
          Expanded(child: Text(
            'The service you share this link through may know a contact request was made. '
            'Assign trust level accordingly after pairing.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecAmber))),
        ]),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 20),
      // Expiry
      DropdownButton<LinkExpiry>(
        value: _linkExpiry,
        isExpanded: true,
        items: [
          DropdownMenuItem(value: LinkExpiry.m5, child: Text('5 minutes')),
          DropdownMenuItem(value: LinkExpiry.h1, child: Text('1 hour')),
          DropdownMenuItem(value: LinkExpiry.h24, child: Text('24 hours')),
        ],
        onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _linkExpiry = v!),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      FilledButton.icon(
        onPressed: _generateLink,
        icon: Icon(Icons.link_outlined),
        label: Text('Generate link'),
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
      ),
      if (_generatedLink != null) ...[
        SizedBox(height: 16),
        Container(
          padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
          child: Row(children: [
            Expanded(child: Text(_generatedLink!,
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(fontFamily: 'monospace'),
              maxLines: 2, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis)),
            IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.copy_outlined, size: 18),
              onPressed: _copyLink),
          ]),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        FilledButton.icon(
          onPressed: _shareLink,
          icon: Icon(Icons.share_outlined),
          label: Text('Share link'),
          style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 48)),
        ),
      ],
    ]),
  )),
  _ContextAnnotationSection(_contextController),
])
```

**_BluetoothTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Expanded(child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center, children: [
      // Activate toggle
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20)),
        child: Column(children: [
          Icon(Icons.bluetooth_outlined, size: 48,
            color: _pairingActive ? kBrand : colorScheme.outline),
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          if (!_pairingActive) ...[
            Text('Activate Bluetooth pairing mode', style: textTheme.titleSmall,
              textAlign: TextAlign.center),
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            Text('Activate only when you\'re ready to pair. '
              'Disable immediately after.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
              textAlign: TextAlign.center),
            SizedBox(height: 16),
            FilledButton(
              onPressed: _activatePairing,
              child: Text('Activate pairing mode'),
            ),
          ] else ...[
            Text('Pairing mode active', style: textTheme.titleSmall.copyWith(
              color: kBrand)),
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            // Countdown ring
            _CircularCountdown(seconds: _pairingSecondsLeft, total: 30),
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            Text('${_pairingSecondsLeft}s remaining',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
            SizedBox(height: 16),
            OutlinedButton(
              onPressed: _deactivatePairing,
              child: Text('Deactivate'),
            ),
          ],
        ]),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
        child: Text(
          'Note: Your device broadcasts a signal while pairing mode is active. '
          'This is visible to nearby Bluetooth scanners. '
          'Not suitable for high-surveillance environments.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ),
    ]),
  )),
  _ContextAnnotationSection(_contextController),
])
```

**_ImportKeyTab:**
```
Column(children: [
  Expanded(child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(children: [
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
        child: Text('For servers and technical setups only. '
          'Key files have no expiry — store them securely.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 20),
      // File picker
      OutlinedButton.icon(
        onPressed: _pickFile,
        icon: Icon(Icons.file_open_outlined),
        label: Text('Select key file'),
        style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      // OR paste
      Text('Or paste key data:', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      TextField(
        controller: _keyDataController,
        minLines: 4, maxLines: 8,
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          hintText: 'Paste key data here...',
          alignLabelWithHint: true,
        ),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      FilledButton(
        onPressed: _hasKeyData ? _importKey : null,
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
        child: Text('Import'),
      ),
    ]),
  )),
  _ContextAnnotationSection(_contextController),
])
```

**Pairing in-flight states (all pairing methods):**

| State | UI | Timeout |
|-------|-----|---------|
| Initiating | Centered spinner + "Connecting..." text below pairing input | — |
| Handshake in progress | Spinner + "Verifying identity..." | 30 seconds → show "Taking longer than expected. Retry?" |
| Success | Haptic `notificationSuccess` + brief green check animation (300ms) + auto-push to SafetyNumberScreen | — |
| Failure | `ErrorBanner` inline: *"Pairing failed. Check the code and try again."* + haptic `notificationError` | — |
| Timeout | `ErrorBanner`: *"Couldn't reach this person. They may be offline."* with Retry button | — |

**Message forwarding flow:**

Long-press message → "Forward" action → `ForwardSheet` (bottom sheet):
- Contact/conversation picker with search (same layout as CreateRoomScreen contact selector)
- Multi-select enabled — user can forward to multiple conversations at once
- "Forward" button at bottom, disabled until ≥1 recipient selected, shows count: "Forward to 3 conversations"
- On tap: messages re-encrypted and sent to each selected conversation
- Sheet dismisses with haptic `lightImpact` + SnackBar: *"Forwarded to N conversations."*

#### 22.8.4 ProfilePreviewScreen

**File**: `features/contacts/screens/profile_preview_screen.dart`

A lightweight read-only view of what a specific contact's paired profile looks like from the outside — useful before pairing, from search results, or when reviewing a message request sender. Does not require the contact to be in the contact list.

**AppBar**: `'Profile'`, no title text (identity shown in body).

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Profile'),
    actions: [
      if (!contact.isPaired)
        FilledButton.icon(
          onPressed: () => Navigator.push(context,
            MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) =>
              PairContactScreen(prefillPeerId: contact.peerId))),
          icon: Icon(Icons.person_add_outlined, size: 16),
          label: Text('Pair'),
        ),
      if (contact.isPaired)
        TextButton(
          onPressed: () => Navigator.push(context,
            MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) =>
              ContactDetailScreen(peerId: contact.peerId))),
          child: Text('View contact'),
        ),
      SizedBox(width: 8),
    ],
  ),
  body: SingleChildScrollView(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
    child: Column(children: [

      // Avatar
      Center(child: _ContactAvatar(peer: contact, size: 80)),
      SizedBox(height: 16),

      // Display name
      Center(child: Text(
        contact.resolvedDisplayName,
        style: textTheme.headlineSmall,
        textAlign: TextAlign.center)),

      // Tagline
      if (contact.resolvedTagline != null) ...[
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Center(child: Text(
          contact.resolvedTagline!,
          style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
            fontStyle: FontStyle.italic),
          textAlign: TextAlign.center)),
      ],

      SizedBox(height: 12),

      // Profile source badge
      Center(child: Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 4),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: _profileSourceColor(contact).withValues(alpha: 0.10),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
          border: Border.all(
            color: _profileSourceColor(contact).withValues(alpha: 0.3))),
        child: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
          Icon(_profileSourceIcon(contact), size: 12,
            color: _profileSourceColor(contact)),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text(_profileSourceLabel(contact),
            style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
              color: _profileSourceColor(contact))),
        ]),
      )),

      // Bio
      if (contact.resolvedBio != null) ...[
        SizedBox(height: 20),
        Align(
          alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
          child: Text('About',
            style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
        SizedBox(height: 6),
        Text(contact.resolvedBio!,
          style: textTheme.bodyMedium),
      ],

      // Contact hint (paired profile only)
      if (contact.pairedProfile?.contactHint != null) ...[
        SizedBox(height: 16),
        Row(children: [
          Icon(Icons.alternate_email_outlined, size: 16,
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
          SizedBox(width: 8),
          Expanded(child: Text(contact.pairedProfile!.contactHint!,
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
              fontFamily: 'monospace'))),
        ]),
      ],

      SizedBox(height: 24),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

Profile source helpers map the same logic as `_profileTierLabel` in ContactDetailScreen (§22.8.2).

---

### 22.9 Network Section

#### 22.9.1 NetworkScreen

**File**: `features/network/screens/network_screen.dart`

**AppBar:**
```
AppBar(
  title: Text('Network'),
  actions: [
    IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.refresh), tooltip: 'Refresh', onPressed: net.loadAll),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ],
)
```

**Body:**
```
ListView(
  children: [

    // 1. CONNECTION OVERVIEW
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 16, 16, 8),
      child: Card(child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Row(children: [
            Container(
              width: 10, height: 10,
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: _connectionStatusColor(net.status),
                shape: BoxShape.circle)),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            Text(_connectionStatusLabel(net.status),
              style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          ]),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Wrap(spacing: 16, children: [
            _StatChip(icon: Icons.hub_outlined,
              label: '${net.activeTunnels} tunnels'),
            _StatChip(icon: Icons.people_outline,
              label: '${net.connectedPeers} peers'),
          ]),
          if (net.activeTransports.isNotEmpty) ...[
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            Wrap(spacing: 4, children: [
              for (final t in net.activeTransports)
                Chip(
                  label: Text(t.shortName, style: textTheme.labelSmall),
                  avatar: Icon(t.icon, size: 14),
                  visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
                  padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
                ),
            ]),
          ],
        ]),
      )),
    ),

    // 2. THREAT CONTEXT
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Threat Context',
      initiallyExpanded: true,
      child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          SegmentedButton<ThreatContext>(
            segments: [
              ButtonSegment(value: ThreatContext.normal,
                label: Text('Normal'), icon: Icon(Icons.radio_button_unchecked, size: 14)),
              ButtonSegment(value: ThreatContext.elevated,
                label: Text('Elevated'), icon: Icon(Icons.warning_outlined, size: 14)),
              ButtonSegment(value: ThreatContext.critical,
                label: Text('Critical'), icon: Icon(Icons.dangerous_outlined, size: 14)),
            ],
            selected: {net.threatContext},
            onSelectionChanged: (s) => net.setThreatContext(s.first),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text(_threatContextDescription(net.threatContext),
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ]),
      ),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 3. TRANSPORTS
    // Collapsed by default — most users never need to touch individual transports.
    // The transport solver (§5.10) handles selection automatically.
    // Expandable for power users who want manual control.
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Transports',
      subtitle: Text(
        '${net.activeTransports.length} active — managed automatically',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Column(children: [
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.security_outlined,
          label: 'Tor',
          description: 'Anonymizes traffic through the Tor network.',
          status: net.torStatus,
          enabled: net.torEnabled,
          onToggle: (v) => net.toggleTransport('tor', v),
        ),
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.vpn_lock_outlined,
          label: 'I2P',
          description: 'I2P overlay network. Best-effort (early-stage).',
          status: net.i2pStatus,
          enabled: net.i2pEnabled,
          onToggle: (v) => net.toggleTransport('i2p', v),
          caution: 'emissary library is experimental',
        ),
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.public_outlined,
          label: 'Clearnet',
          description: 'Direct internet routing. Encrypted but visible.',
          status: net.clearnetStatus,
          enabled: net.clearnetEnabled,
          onToggle: (v) => net.toggleTransport('clearnet', v),
          expandedContent: _ClearnetSettings(net: net),
        ),
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.bluetooth_outlined,
          label: 'Bluetooth',
          description: 'Local peer-to-peer. Steganographic advertisements.',
          status: net.bluetoothStatus,
          enabled: net.bluetoothEnabled,
          onToggle: (v) => net.toggleTransport('bluetooth', v),
          expandedContent: _BluetoothSettings(net: net),
        ),
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.wifi_outlined,
          label: 'WiFi Direct',
          description: 'High bandwidth (~250 Mbps) local connections.',
          status: net.wifiDirectStatus,
          enabled: net.wifiDirectEnabled,
          onToggle: (v) => net.toggleTransport('wifi_direct', v),
          note: Platform.isIOS ? 'Limited on iOS — uses MultipeerConnectivity' : null,
        ),
        _TransportTile(
          icon: Icons.radio_outlined,
          label: 'RF / LoRa',
          description: 'Radio frequency transport. Requires hardware.',
          status: net.rfStatus,
          enabled: net.rfEnabled && net.rfHardwarePresent,
          onToggle: net.rfHardwarePresent ? (v) => net.toggleTransport('rf', v) : null,
          disabled: !net.rfHardwarePresent,
          note: net.rfHardwarePresent ? null : 'No compatible hardware detected',
        ),
      ]),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 4. LOCAL DISCOVERY
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Local Discovery',
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Column(children: [
        SwitchListTile(
          secondary: Icon(Icons.wifi_find_outlined),
          title: Text('mDNS'),
          subtitle: Text('Trusted local networks only. '
            'Announces your presence to the entire LAN.'),
          value: net.mdnsEnabled,
          onChanged: (v) => net.toggleMdns(v),
        ),
        if (net.discoveredPeers.isNotEmpty) ...[
          Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 4, 16, 4),
            child: Text('Discovered (${net.discoveredPeers.length})',
              style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
          for (final p in net.discoveredPeers)
            ListTile(
              dense: true,
              leading: Icon(Icons.device_hub_outlined, size: 20),
              title: Text(p.id.length > 16 ? p.id.substring(0, 16) + '...' : p.id,
                style: kMono),
              subtitle: Text(p.address,
                style: textTheme.bodySmall),
              trailing: TextButton(onPressed: () => _pairDiscovered(p),
                child: Text('Pair')),
            ),
        ],
      ]),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 5. TRUSTED CONTEXTS (§4.8.3)
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Trusted Contexts',
      subtitle: Text(
        'Networks where discovery is permitted',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Column(children: [
        Padding(padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 4),
          child: Text(
            'Trusted contexts are networks you control or that require '
            'authentication to join. Peers discovered over trusted contexts '
            'can be found automatically via mDNS. Pairing over a trusted '
            'context gives the peer a trust boost.\n\n'
            'This affects discovery only — routing and pathing are never changed.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
        SwitchListTile(
          secondary: Icon(Icons.vpn_key_outlined),
          title: Text('Tailscale'),
          subtitle: Text('Pre-authenticated overlay network'),
          value: net.trustedContext.tailscale,
          onChanged: (v) => net.setTrustedContext('tailscale', v),
        ),
        if (net.trustedContext.tailscale)
          _OverlayRequirementsHint(
            name: 'Tailscale',
            body: 'Mesh Infinity uses the Tailscale network you've already configured. '
                  'No additional setup is required with a default (allow-all) policy.\n\n'
                  'If you have custom ACL rules, ensure UDP port 51820 is permitted '
                  'between Mesh Infinity nodes. Mesh Infinity does not modify your '
                  'Tailscale configuration.',
          ),
        SwitchListTile(
          secondary: Icon(Icons.lan_outlined),
          title: Text('ZeroTier'),
          subtitle: Text('Pre-authenticated overlay network'),
          value: net.trustedContext.zerotier,
          onChanged: (v) => net.setTrustedContext('zerotier', v),
        ),
        if (net.trustedContext.zerotier)
          _OverlayRequirementsHint(
            name: 'ZeroTier',
            body: 'Mesh Infinity uses the ZeroTier network you've already joined. '
                  'No additional setup is required with default flow rules.\n\n'
                  'If you have custom flow rules that restrict ports, ensure UDP '
                  'port 51820 is permitted between nodes. Mesh Infinity does not '
                  'modify your ZeroTier configuration.',
          ),
        SwitchListTile(
          secondary: Icon(Icons.home_outlined),
          title: Text('Local Network (LAN)'),
          subtitle: Text('Enable for home/office networks you control'),
          value: net.trustedContext.lan,
          onChanged: (v) => net.setTrustedContext('lan', v),
        ),
        SwitchListTile(
          secondary: Icon(Icons.wifi_find_outlined),
          title: Text('Allow mDNS on trusted'),
          subtitle: Text('Automatic peer discovery on trusted networks'),
          value: net.trustedContext.allowMdns,
          onChanged: (v) => net.setTrustedContext('mdns', v),
        ),
      ]),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 6. TRUST METRICS
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Trust Metrics',
      subtitle: Text(
        'Network trust overview',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          // Trust distribution chart
          Row(children: [
            Expanded(child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
              Text('Trust Distribution', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
              SizedBox(height: 8),
              _TrustBar(label: 'Inner Circle', count: net.trustCounts[8] ?? 0,
                color: kTrustInnerCircle, total: net.totalPeers),
              _TrustBar(label: 'Highly Trusted', count: net.trustCounts[7] ?? 0,
                color: kTrustHighly, total: net.totalPeers),
              _TrustBar(label: 'Trusted', count: net.trustCounts[6] ?? 0,
                color: kTrustTrusted, total: net.totalPeers),
              _TrustBar(label: 'Acquaintance', count: net.trustCounts[5] ?? 0,
                color: kTrustAcquaint, total: net.totalPeers),
              _TrustBar(label: 'Untrusted (0-4)', count: net.untrustedCount,
                color: kTrustUntrusted, total: net.totalPeers),
            ])),
          ]),
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          // Pairing source breakdown
          Text('Pairing Methods', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Wrap(spacing: 8, runSpacing: 4, children: [
            _MethodChip(label: 'QR', count: net.pairingCounts['qr'] ?? 0),
            _MethodChip(label: 'NFC', count: net.pairingCounts['nfc'] ?? 0),
            _MethodChip(label: 'Code', count: net.pairingCounts['code'] ?? 0),
            _MethodChip(label: 'Link', count: net.pairingCounts['link'] ?? 0),
            _MethodChip(label: 'BLE', count: net.pairingCounts['ble'] ?? 0),
            _MethodChip(label: 'Trusted Ctx', count: net.pairingCounts['trusted_ctx'] ?? 0),
          ]),
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          // Trusted context stats
          Text('Trusted Context Discovery', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          _StatRow(label: 'Peers found via Tailscale', value: '${net.trustedCtxPeers.tailscale}'),
          _StatRow(label: 'Peers found via ZeroTier', value: '${net.trustedCtxPeers.zerotier}'),
          _StatRow(label: 'Peers found via LAN', value: '${net.trustedCtxPeers.lan}'),
          _StatRow(label: 'Trust-boosted pairings', value: '${net.trustedCtxPeers.boostedPairings}'),
        ]),
      ),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 7. EXIT NODES
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Exit Node',
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          if (net.activeExitNode == null)
            Text('No exit node selected.',
              style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))
          else
            ListTile(
              contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
              leading: MaskAvatar(name: net.activeExitNode!.name, size: small),
              title: Text(net.activeExitNode!.name),
              subtitle: Row(children: [
                Text(net.activeExitNodeProfile ?? 'Direct clearnet'),
                if (net.exitViaAnonymizer)
                  Text(' · via Tor',
                    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecGreen)),
              ]),
              trailing: TextButton(
                onPressed: () => net.setExitNode(null),
                child: Text('Disconnect')),
            ),
          SizedBox(height: 12),
          OutlinedButton.icon(
            onPressed: _openExitNodeSelector,
            icon: Icon(Icons.route_outlined),
            label: Text(net.activeExitNode == null ? 'Select exit node' : 'Change'),
            style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 44)),
          ),
        ]),
      ),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // 6. METRICS (link)
    ListTile(
      leading: Icon(Icons.insights_outlined),
      title: Text('Network metrics'),
      subtitle: Text('Privacy traffic, tunnels, and statistics'),
      trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
      onTap: () => Navigator.push(context,
        MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => const MetricsScreen())),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),
  ],
)
```

**_TransportTile widget:**

```
ExpansionTile(
  leading: Container(
    width: 40, height: 40,
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: (enabled && !disabled)
        ? colorScheme.primaryContainer.withValues(alpha: 0.5)
        : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
    child: Icon(icon, size: 22,
      color: (enabled && !disabled)
        ? colorScheme.primary
        : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
  ),
  title: Text(label, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
  subtitle: Column(
    crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    children: [
      Text(description,
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      if (note != null)
        Text(note!, style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: kSecAmber, fontSize: 11)),
      if (caution != null)
        Text(caution!, style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: kSecAmber, fontSize: 11)),
    ],
  ),
  trailing: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    // Status chip
    _TransportStatusChip(status: status),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    // Toggle
    Switch(
      value: enabled,
      onChanged: disabled ? null : onToggle,
    ),
  ]),
  children: [
    if (expandedContent != null) expandedContent!,
  ],
)
```

**_TransportStatusChip:**
```
// Small chip: 'Active' (green), 'Available' (outline), 'Off' (gray), 'Error' (red)
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 3),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: _statusColor(status).withValues(alpha: 0.12),
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
  child: Text(_statusLabel(status),
    style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10, color: _statusColor(status),
      fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
)
```

**_OverlayRequirementsHint widget:**

Shown inline when a trusted-context overlay toggle is enabled. Informs the user what (if anything) they may need to configure in their own overlay network. Does not take any action — purely informational.

```
// Shown when net.trustedContext.tailscale or .zerotier is true
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 8),
  child: Container(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
      border: Border.all(color: colorScheme.outlineVariant)),
    child: Row(
      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
      children: [
        Icon(Icons.info_outline, size: 16,
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        Expanded(
          child: Text(body,
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
      ]),
  ),
)
```

The `body` text is defined in the `_OverlayRequirementsHint` constructor per overlay type (see trusted contexts section above). Plain language only — no jargon, no commands, no scary warnings. The tone is: "here's what you might need to check; no action required if you haven't changed the defaults."

Threat context descriptions:
- Normal: "Standard operation. Optimize for performance within security policy."
- Elevated: "Prefer anonymizing transports. Clearnet requires minimum 1 hop. LoSec available."
- Critical: "Maximum security. Clearnet disabled. LoSec unavailable. Only anonymizing transports."

#### 22.9.2 MetricsScreen

**File**: `features/network/screens/metrics_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Network Metrics'`.

```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // PRIVACY CARD
    _MetricsCard(
      title: 'Privacy',
      children: [
        _MetricRow(
          icon: Icons.shield_outlined,
          label: 'Cover traffic today',
          value: _formatBytes(metrics.coverTrafficBytes),
          tooltip: 'Extra encrypted data sent to make your activity '
            'harder to distinguish from others\'.',
        ),
        _MetricRow(
          icon: Icons.people_outline,
          label: 'Routing for others',
          value: '${metrics.peersRoutedFor} peers',
          tooltip: 'Your device helped route encrypted messages for '
            'this many other users today.',
        ),
        _MetricRow(
          icon: Icons.blur_circular_outlined,
          label: 'Anonymity set estimate',
          value: '~${metrics.anonymitySetEstimate} nodes',
          tooltip: 'Your traffic blends with approximately this many '
            'other nodes. Larger is better.',
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        // Privacy ratio bar
        Text('Real vs cover traffic',
          style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        ClipRRect(
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4),
          child: Row(children: [
            Flexible(
              flex: (metrics.realTrafficRatio * 100).round(),
              child: Container(height: 8, color: kBrand)),
            Flexible(
              flex: (100 - metrics.realTrafficRatio * 100).round(),
              child: Container(height: 8, color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.4))),
          ]),
        ),
        SizedBox(height: 4),
        Row(children: [
          _LegendDot(color: kBrand),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text('Real (${(metrics.realTrafficRatio * 100).round()}%)',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          SizedBox(width: 12),
          _LegendDot(color: kSecGreen),
          SizedBox(width: 4),
          Text('Cover (${(100 - metrics.realTrafficRatio * 100).round()}%)',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall),
        ]),
      ],
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 12),

    // CONNECTION CARD
    _MetricsCard(
      title: 'Connection',
      children: [
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.hub_outlined,
          label: 'Active tunnels', value: '${metrics.activeTunnels}'),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.people_outline,
          label: 'Peers in map', value: '${metrics.networkMapSize}'),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.route_outlined,
          label: 'Threat context', value: _threatContextLabel(metrics.threatContext)),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.settings_ethernet_outlined,
          label: 'Connection mode', value: _connectionModeLabel(metrics.connectionMode)),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.inbox_outlined,
          label: 'S&F nodes in use', value: '${metrics.storeFwdNodes}'),
      ],
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 12),

    // ACTIVITY CARD
    _MetricsCard(
      title: 'Today\'s activity',
      children: [
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.chat_bubble_outline,
          label: 'Messages sent', value: '${metrics.messagesSent}'),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.cloud_outlined,
          label: 'Via store-and-forward',
          value: '${metrics.messagesViaStoreForward} / ${metrics.messagesSent}'),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.upload_outlined,
          label: 'Data sent', value: _formatBytes(metrics.bytesSent)),
        _MetricRow(icon: Icons.download_outlined,
          label: 'Data received', value: _formatBytes(metrics.bytesReceived)),
      ],
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 12),

    // TRANSPORT BREAKDOWN
    _MetricsCard(
      title: 'Transport usage',
      children: [
        for (final t in metrics.transportBreakdown.entries)
          _TransportRow(name: t.key, bytes: t.value, total: metrics.bytesSent),
      ],
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

**_MetricsCard:**
```
Card(child: Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Text(title, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    ...children,
  ]),
))
```

**_MetricRow:**
```
Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4),
  child: Row(children: [
    Icon(icon, size: 18, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    SizedBox(width: 10),
    Expanded(child: Text(label, style: textTheme.bodyMedium)),
    Text(value, style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
      fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
    if (tooltip != null)
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 4),
        child: Tooltip(
          message: tooltip!,
          child: Icon(Icons.info_outline, size: 14,
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ),
  ]),
)
```

#### 22.9.3 ExitNodeScreen

**File**: `features/network/screens/exit_node_screen.dart`

Reached from the Exit Node tile in §22.9.1. Shows a list of available exit nodes and allows selection of a network profile per node.

**AppBar**: `'Exit Node'`.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Exit Node'),
    actions: [
      if (net.activeExitNode != null)
        TextButton(
          onPressed: net.disconnectExitNode,
          child: Text('Disconnect'),
        ),
    ],
  ),
  body: Column(children: [

    // Explanation banner
    Container(
      width: double.infinity,
      color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
      child: Text(
        'An exit node routes your traffic to the regular internet. '
        'Your identity is hidden from the exit node operator unless '
        'you route via Tor.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      ),
    ),

    // Active node header
    if (net.activeExitNode != null)
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 12),
        child: Row(children: [
          Icon(Icons.check_circle_outline, size: 18, color: kSecGreen),
          SizedBox(width: 8),
          Text('Connected to ${net.activeExitNode!.name}',
            style: textTheme.titleSmall),
        ]),
      ),

    // Nodes list
    Expanded(
      child: net.availableExitNodes.isEmpty
        ? Center(
            child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
              Icon(Icons.route_outlined, size: 56, color: colorScheme.outline),
              SizedBox(height: 12),
              Text('No exit nodes available',
                style: textTheme.titleMedium),
              SizedBox(height: 4),
              Text(
                'Trusted contacts who offer exit node services will appear here.',
                style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                  color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
                textAlign: TextAlign.center),
            ]),
          )
        : ListView.separated(
            itemCount: net.availableExitNodes.length,
            separatorBuilder: (_, __) => Divider(height: 1),
            itemBuilder: (ctx, i) =>
              _ExitNodeTile(
                node: net.availableExitNodes[i],
                isActive: net.activeExitNode?.id == net.availableExitNodes[i].id,
                onSelect: (profile) => net.connectExitNode(
                  net.availableExitNodes[i], profile),
              ),
          ),
    ),
  ]),
)
```

**_ExitNodeTile:**
```dart
// Expandable tile. Collapsed: name + trust badge + capability chips.
// Expanded: network profile selector + connect button.
ExpansionTile(
  leading: MaskAvatar(name: node.name, size: MaskAvatarSize.small),
  title: Row(children: [
    Expanded(child: Text(node.name, style: textTheme.titleSmall)),
    TrustBadge(level: node.trustLevel, compact: true),
  ]),
  subtitle: Wrap(spacing: 4, runSpacing: 4, children: [
    if (node.capabilities.supportsDirectClearnet)
      _CapChip(label: 'Direct'),
    if (node.capabilities.supportsTorRouting)
      _CapChip(label: 'Via Tor', color: kSecGreen),
    if (node.capabilities.supportsI2PRouting)
      _CapChip(label: 'Via I2P', color: kBrand),
    _CapChip(
      label: node.capabilities.bandwidthTier,
      icon: Icons.speed_outlined),
  ]),
  initiallyExpanded: isActive,
  children: [
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [

        // Network profile selector
        Text('Routing mode', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        SegmentedButton<ExitNodeProfile>(
          segments: [
            if (node.capabilities.supportsDirectClearnet)
              ButtonSegment(
                value: ExitNodeProfile.direct,
                label: Text('Direct'),
                icon: Icon(Icons.public_outlined, size: 14)),
            if (node.capabilities.supportsTorRouting)
              ButtonSegment(
                value: ExitNodeProfile.viaTor,
                label: Text('Via Tor'),
                icon: Icon(Icons.security_outlined, size: 14)),
            if (node.capabilities.supportsI2PRouting)
              ButtonSegment(
                value: ExitNodeProfile.viaI2P,
                label: Text('Via I2P'),
                icon: Icon(Icons.vpn_lock_outlined, size: 14)),
          ],
          selected: {_selectedProfile},
          onSelectionChanged: (s) => setState(() => _selectedProfile = s.first),
        ),

        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Text(_profileDescription(_selectedProfile),
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),

        SizedBox(height: 16),

        // Connect / disconnect button
        if (isActive)
          OutlinedButton(
            onPressed: net.disconnectExitNode,
            style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 44)),
            child: Text('Disconnect'),
          )
        else
          FilledButton.icon(
            onPressed: () => onSelect(_selectedProfile),
            icon: Icon(Icons.route_outlined),
            label: Text('Connect'),
```
