```dart
            style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 44)),
          ),
      ]),
    ),
  ],
)
```

Profile descriptions:
- Direct: "Your mesh identity is hidden, but the exit node sees your destination. No additional anonymization."
- Via Tor: "Traffic routes through Tor before exiting. Slower, but the exit node cannot see your mesh identity or traffic pattern."
- Via I2P: "Traffic routes through I2P before exiting. Best-effort (emissary is experimental)."

Legal warning shown once per session on first exit node connection:
```dart
AlertDialog(
  title: Text('Exit node usage'),
  content: Text(
    'Traffic routed through an exit node appears to originate from that '
    'node\'s IP address. The exit node operator can see your destination '
    'addresses unless you select Tor or I2P routing.\n\n'
    'Only use exit nodes operated by people you trust.',
  ),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context, false),
      child: Text('Cancel')),
    FilledButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context, true),
      child: Text('I understand, connect')),
  ],
)
```

---

#### 22.9.4 AppConnectorScreen

**File**: `features/network/screens/app_connector_screen.dart`

App Connector routes traffic from other installed apps through the mesh. Enabled only when VPN mode is active (§13.15). Reached from a tile in §22.9.1 that is only visible when the Network Controls tier is enabled.

**AppBar**: `'App Connector'`.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(title: Text('App Connector')),
  body: Column(children: [

    // VPN mode master toggle
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Card(child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Row(children: [
            Expanded(
              child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
                Text('Mesh VPN mode', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
                SizedBox(height: 2),
                Text(
                  'Routes selected apps through the mesh network.',
                  style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                    color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
              ]),
            ),
            Switch(
              value: connector.vpnEnabled,
              onChanged: connector.vpnEnabled
                ? (v) => _confirmDisable()
                : (v) => _enableVPN(),
            ),
          ]),
          if (connector.vpnEnabled) ...[
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            Row(children: [
              Container(
                width: 8, height: 8,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: kSecGreen, shape: BoxShape.circle)),
              SizedBox(width: 6),
              Text('Active — routing ${connector.activeAppCount} apps',
                style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecGreen)),
            ]),
          ],
        ]),
      )),
    ),

    if (!connector.vpnEnabled)
      Expanded(
        child: Center(
          child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
            Icon(Icons.vpn_key_outlined, size: 56, color: colorScheme.outline),
            SizedBox(height: 12),
            Text('VPN mode is off', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text(
              'Enable Mesh VPN mode above to route other apps\' '
              'traffic through the mesh network.',
              style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
              textAlign: TextAlign.center),
          ]),
        ),
      )
    else ...[

      // Mode selector
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Text('App selection mode', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          SegmentedButton<ConnectorMode>(
            segments: [
              ButtonSegment(value: ConnectorMode.allowlist,
                label: Text('Selected apps only'),
                icon: Icon(Icons.checklist_outlined, size: 14)),
              ButtonSegment(value: ConnectorMode.denylist,
                label: Text('All except excluded'),
                icon: Icon(Icons.block_outlined, size: 14)),
            ],
            selected: {connector.mode},
            onSelectionChanged: (s) => connector.setMode(s.first),
          ),
          SizedBox(height: 4),
          Text(
            connector.mode == ConnectorMode.allowlist
              ? 'Only the apps you select will route through the mesh.'
              : 'All apps will route through the mesh except those you exclude.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ]),
      ),

      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Divider(height: 1),

      // App list header
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 12, 16, 4),
        child: Row(children: [
          Expanded(
            child: Text(
              connector.mode == ConnectorMode.allowlist
                ? 'Apps to route through mesh'
                : 'Excluded apps',
              style: textTheme.titleSmall)),
          TextButton.icon(
            onPressed: _openAppPicker,
            icon: Icon(Icons.add, size: 16),
            label: Text('Add'),
          ),
        ]),
      ),

      // App list
      Expanded(
        child: connector.configuredApps.isEmpty
          ? Center(
              child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
                Icon(Icons.apps_outlined, size: 40, color: colorScheme.outline),
                SizedBox(height: 8),
                Text(
                  connector.mode == ConnectorMode.allowlist
                    ? 'No apps selected — tap Add'
                    : 'No exclusions — all apps are routed',
                  style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
                    color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
                  textAlign: TextAlign.center),
              ]),
            )
          : ListView.separated(
              itemCount: connector.configuredApps.length,
              separatorBuilder: (_, __) => Divider(height: 1, indent: 72),
              itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
                final app = connector.configuredApps[i];
                return ListTile(
                  leading: app.icon != null
                    ? ClipRRect(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
                        child: Image(image: app.icon!, width: 40, height: 40))
                    : Icon(Icons.apps_outlined, size: 40),
                  title: Text(app.name),
                  subtitle: Text(app.packageName,
                    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                      color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
                      fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 11)),
                  trailing: IconButton(
                    icon: Icon(Icons.remove_circle_outline,
                      color: colorScheme.error),
                    tooltip: 'Remove',
                    onPressed: () => connector.removeApp(app.packageName),
                  ),
                );
              },
            ),
      ),
    ],
  ]),
)
```

**VPN enable flow** (`_enableVPN`):
Before activating, show a one-time consent dialog:
```dart
AlertDialog(
  title: Text('Enable Mesh VPN'),
  content: Text(
    'Mesh VPN mode creates a VPN connection so the mesh can route '
    'selected apps\' traffic.\n\n'
    'Traffic routed this way is encrypted within the mesh. '
    'You remain responsible for the content of the traffic you route.\n\n'
    'Android will show a VPN key icon in your notification bar '
    'while this is active.',
  ),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
      child: Text('Cancel')),
    FilledButton(onPressed: () {
      Navigator.pop(context);
      connector.enable();
    }, child: Text('Enable')),
  ],
)
```

**App picker** (`_openAppPicker`): system-provided app chooser sheet on Android, on iOS shows apps that have declared `LSApplicationQueriesSchemes` compatibility (limited by iOS sandbox restrictions — note shown if list is short).

---

### 22.10 Settings Section

#### 22.10.1 SettingsScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/settings_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Settings'`.

```
ListView(children: [

  // ─── IDENTITY ───
  SectionHeader('Identity'),
  ListTile(
    leading: MaskAvatar(mask: activeMask, size: medium),
    title: Text(activeMask.name),
    subtitle: Text('${masks.length} mask${masks.length == 1 ? '' : 's'} configured'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(IdentityMasksScreen())),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── NOTIFICATIONS ───
  SectionHeader('Notifications'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.notifications_outlined),
    title: Text('Mesh notifications'),
    subtitle: Text('Active when app is open — always enabled'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.check, size: 18, color: kSecGreen),
  ),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.notifications_active_outlined),
    title: Text('Notifications'),
    subtitle: Text(_backgroundDeliverySubtitle()),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(NotificationsScreen())),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── DEVICES ───
  SectionHeader('Devices'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.devices_outlined),
    title: Text('My devices'),
    subtitle: Text('${settings.deviceCount} device${settings.deviceCount == 1 ? '' : 's'} registered'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(MultiDeviceScreen())),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── INFINET ───
  if (settings.inInfinet)
    ...[ 
      SectionHeader('Infinet'),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.lan_outlined),
        title: Text(settings.infinetName ?? 'My Infinet'),
        subtitle: Text('${settings.infinetMemberCount} members · ${settings.infinetDeviceCount} devices'),
        trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
        onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(InfinetScreen())),
      ),
      Divider(height: 1),
    ],

  // ─── SECURITY ───
  SectionHeader('Security'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.pin_outlined),
    title: Text('App PIN'),
    subtitle: Text(settings.pinEnabled ? 'Enabled' : 'Not set'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(PinScreen())),
  ),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.emergency_outlined),
    title: Text('Emergency erase'),
    subtitle: Text(settings.emergencyEraseConfigured
      ? 'Configured' : 'Not configured — recommended'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(EmergencyEraseScreen())),
  ),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.science_outlined),
    title: Text('Potential extremes'),
    subtitle: Text('Advanced security features'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(PotentialExtremesScreen())),
  ),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.help_outline),
    title: Text('Known limitations'),
    subtitle: Text('What this app cannot protect against'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(KnownLimitationsScreen())),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── PRIVACY ───
  SectionHeader('Privacy'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.settings_ethernet_outlined),
    title: Text('Default connection mode'),
    subtitle: Text(_connectionModeLabel(settings.defaultConnectionMode)),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: _openConnectionModePicker,
  ),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.public_outlined),
    title: Text('Clearnet policy'),
    subtitle: Text('Min ${settings.clearnetMinHops} hop before clearnet'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: _openClearnetPolicy,
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── APPEARANCE ───
  SectionHeader('Appearance'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.dark_mode_outlined),
    title: Text('Theme'),
    trailing: DropdownButton<ThemeMode>(
      value: settings.themeMode,
      underline: SizedBox(),
      items: [
        DropdownMenuItem(value: ThemeMode.system, child: Text('System')),
        DropdownMenuItem(value: ThemeMode.light, child: Text('Light')),
        DropdownMenuItem(value: ThemeMode.dark, child: Text('Dark')),
      ],
      onChanged: (v) => settings.setThemeMode(v!),
    ),
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── DATA ───
  SectionHeader('Data'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.backup_outlined),
    title: Text('Export backup'),
    subtitle: Text('Standard or extended — saved to local storage'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: _openBackupSheet,
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── SERVICES ───
  SectionHeader('Hosted Services'),
  if (settings.services.isEmpty)
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 16),
      child: Text('No services configured',
        style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    )
  else
    for (final svc in settings.services) _ServiceTile(service: svc, ...),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.add_circle_outline),
    title: Text('Add service'),
    onTap: _addService,
  ),

  Divider(height: 1),

  // ─── NODE MANAGEMENT (server-mode only) ───
  if (settings.nodeMode == NodeMode.server || settings.nodeMode == NodeMode.dual)
    ...[
      SectionHeader('Node management'),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.dns_outlined),
        title: Text('Node management interface'),
        subtitle: Text('Plugins, services, storage, health'),
        trailing: Icon(Icons.open_in_new_outlined, size: 18),
        onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(NodeManagementScreen())),
      ),
      Divider(height: 1),
    ],

  // ─── ABOUT ───
  SectionHeader('About'),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.info_outline),
    title: Text('Mesh Infinity'),
    subtitle: Text('v0.2.0'),
    trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
    onTap: _openAbout,
  ),

  SizedBox(height: 32),
])
```

_backgroundDeliverySubtitle:
- Android: "Using persistent connection"
- iOS, APNs not set: "Limited to when app is open — tap to configure"
- iOS, APNs tier 3: "Silent push via Apple"
- iOS, APNs tier 4: "Full notifications via Apple"

**Backup type bottom sheet** (`_openBackupSheet`):
```dart
showModalBottomSheet(
  child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 32),
    child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
      BottomSheetHandle(),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text('Export backup', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
      SizedBox(height: 4),
      Text('Backups are encrypted with your passphrase.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.save_outlined),
        title: Text('Standard backup'),
        subtitle: Text('Identity keys, trust graph, contacts'),
        trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
        onTap: () { Navigator.pop(context); _exportBackup(BackupType.standard); },
      ),
      ListTile(
        leading: Icon(Icons.save_alt_outlined),
        title: Text('Extended backup'),
        subtitle: Text('Includes message history and media references'),
        trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
        onTap: () { Navigator.pop(context); _exportBackup(BackupType.extended); },
      ),
    ]),
  ),
);
```

#### 22.10.2 IdentityMasksScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/identity_masks_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Identity & Masks'`.

```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // SELF CARD
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Row(children: [
          Icon(Icons.hub_outlined, size: 20, color: colorScheme.primary),
          SizedBox(width: 8),
          Text('Your identity', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Text(
          'The root of all your masks. Never exposed on the mesh directly.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        // Truncated peer ID
        Row(children: [
          Expanded(child: SelectableText(
            identity.peerId.length > 24
              ? identity.peerId.substring(0, 24) + '...'
              : identity.peerId,
            style: kMono)),
          IconButton(
            icon: Icon(Icons.copy_outlined, size: 18),
            onPressed: () => _copy(context, identity.peerId, 'Peer ID')),
          IconButton(
            icon: Icon(Icons.qr_code_outlined, size: 18),
            tooltip: 'Show QR',
            onPressed: _showQR),
        ]),
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // MASKS LIST
    Row(children: [
      Text('Masks', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      Spacer(),
      TextButton.icon(
        onPressed: _createMask,
        icon: Icon(Icons.add, size: 16),
        label: Text('New mask'),
      ),
    ]),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    for (final mask in identity.masks)
      Card(
        margin: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
        child: ListTile(
          contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
          leading: MaskAvatar(mask: mask, size: MaskAvatarSize.medium),
          title: Row(children: [
            Text(mask.name, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            if (mask.isActive)
              Container(
                padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
                  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
                child: Text('Active', style: TextStyle(
                  fontSize: 10, color: kBrand, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
          ]),
          subtitle: Text(
            '${mask.groupCount} group${mask.groupCount == 1 ? '' : 's'} · '
            '${mask.addressCount} address${mask.addressCount == 1 ? '' : 'es'}',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
          onTap: () => Navigator.push(context,
            MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => MaskEditScreen(maskId: mask.id))),
        ),
      ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // ANONYMOUS MASKS
    _ExpandableSection(
      title: 'Anonymous masks',
      initiallyExpanded: false,
      child: Column(children: [
        // Warning banner
        Padding(
          padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 12),
          child: Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: kSecPurple.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
              border: Border.all(color: kSecPurple.withValues(alpha: 0.3))),
            child: Text(
              'Anonymous masks cannot be linked to your identity — not even by you. '
              'Trust levels do not apply.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          ),
        ),
        for (final mask in identity.anonymousMasks)
          ListTile(
            leading: Container(
              width: 40, height: 40,
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: kSecPurple.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
                shape: BoxShape.circle),
              child: Icon(Icons.person_outline, color: kSecPurple)),
            title: Text(mask.name),
            trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
            onTap: () => _openAnonymousMask(mask),
          ),
        ListTile(
          leading: Icon(Icons.add_circle_outline),
          title: Text('Create anonymous mask'),
          onTap: _createAnonymousMask,
        ),
      ]),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

#### 22.10.3 MaskEditScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/mask_edit_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: mask name. Action: `Icons.delete_outlined` (error color, admin only).

```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // AVATAR + NAME
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(children: [
        MaskAvatar(mask: currentMask, size: MaskAvatarSize.large),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        // Color picker
        Wrap(spacing: 8, children: [
          for (final color in kMaskAvatarColors)
            GestureDetector(
              onTap: () => _setColor(color),
              child: Container(
                width: 32, height: 32,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(
                  color: color, shape: BoxShape.circle,
                  border: currentMask.avatarColor == color
                    ? Border.all(color: colorScheme.onSurface, width: 2.5) : null),
                child: currentMask.avatarColor == color
                  ? Icon(Icons.check, size: 16, color: Colors.white) : null,
              ),
            ),
        ]),
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 12),

    TextField(
      controller: _nameController,
      decoration: InputDecoration(labelText: 'Mask name'),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // ─── PUBLIC PROFILE (global, searchable) ───
    SectionHeader('Public profile'),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
      child: Text(
        'Visible to anyone on the network if you enable public discovery. '
        'Off by default — most users should leave this empty.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ),
    SwitchListTile(
      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
      title: Text('Enable public profile'),
      subtitle: Text(mask.identityIsPublic
        ? 'Your display name and bio are searchable on the network.'
        : 'You are not discoverable. Your addresses exist but have no public identity.'),
      value: mask.identityIsPublic,
      onChanged: (v) => _setPublic(v),
    ),
    if (mask.identityIsPublic) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      TextField(
        controller: _publicDisplayNameController,
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          labelText: 'Public display name',
          helperText: 'Visible to anyone — can differ from your paired profile name.'),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      TextField(
        controller: _publicBioController,
        maxLines: 2,
        maxLength: 160,
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          labelText: 'Public bio (optional)',
          helperText: 'Visible to anyone.'),
      ),
    ],

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // ─── PAIRED PROFILE (shown to contacts you've paired with) ───
    SectionHeader('Paired profile'),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
      child: Text(
        'Shown to anyone you\'ve directly paired with, regardless of their trust level. '
        'Not searchable — only your direct contacts see this.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ),
    TextField(
      controller: _pairedDisplayNameController,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Display name',
        helperText: 'How your paired contacts see you in their chat list.'),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    TextField(
      controller: _pairedTaglineController,
      maxLength: 128,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Tagline (optional)',
        helperText: 'One-liner — e.g. "Software engineer, coffee drinker".',
        counterText: ''),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    TextField(
      controller: _pairedBioController,
      maxLines: 4,
      maxLength: 512,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Bio (optional)',
        helperText: 'Full "About Me" — only shown to your direct contacts.',
        alignLabelWithHint: true),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    TextField(
      controller: _pairedContactHintController,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Contact hint (optional)',
        helperText: 'Extra address for your paired contacts only. Not in the public map.'),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 4),
      child: Text(
        'Garden-specific profiles are edited within each Garden.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
          fontStyle: FontStyle.italic)),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // ─── PRIVATE PROFILE (Level 5+ trusted peers only) ───
    SectionHeader('Private profile'),
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
      child: Text(
        'Only shared with contacts you explicitly trust at Level 6 or above. '
        'Exchanged via cryptographic escrow — neither party sees it unless both consent.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    ),
    TextField(
      controller: _privateDisplayNameController,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Private display name (optional)',
        helperText: 'Override for trusted contacts — e.g. your real name.'),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    TextField(
      controller: _privateBioController,
      maxLines: 3,
      decoration: InputDecoration(
        labelText: 'Private bio (optional)',
        helperText: 'Visible only to trusted contacts.'),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // ADDRESSES SECTION
    SectionHeader('Addresses'),
    for (final addr in mask.addresses)
      ListTile(
        dense: true,
        title: Text(
          addr.hex.length > 20 ? addr.hex.substring(0, 20) + '...' : addr.hex,
          style: kMono),
        subtitle: Text(addr.type.label,
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ),
    OutlinedButton.icon(
      onPressed: _rotatePreAuthKey,
      icon: Icon(Icons.refresh_outlined, size: 18),
      label: Text('Rotate contact key'),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    Text('Refreshes your contact key. Existing connections unaffected.',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // GROUPS
    SectionHeader('Groups using this mask'),
    if (mask.groups.isEmpty)
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 0, vertical: 8),
        child: Text('No groups',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      )
    else
      for (final group in mask.groups)
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          leading: Icon(Icons.groups_outlined, size: 20),
          title: Text(group.name),
        ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // SAVE BUTTON
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: _save,
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
      child: Text('Save changes'),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

#### 22.10.4 PotentialExtremesScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/potential_extremes_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Potential Extremes'`.

```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // Warning header
    Container(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
        border: Border.all(color: kSecAmber.withValues(alpha: 0.3))),
      child: Row(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Icon(Icons.warning_amber_outlined, color: kSecAmber, size: 20),
        SizedBox(width: 12),
        Expanded(child: Text(
          'These features involve real tradeoffs. Each description explains '
          'exactly what an adversary can learn when you use them.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall)),
      ]),
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 16),

    // PRE-COMMITTED DISTRESS MESSAGE
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Row(children: [
          Expanded(child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
            Text('Pre-committed distress message',
              style: textTheme.titleSmall),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text('A message sends automatically if you stop checking in.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          ])),
          Switch(value: settings.distressMessageEnabled,
            onChanged: settings.distressMessageEnabled ? _disableDistress : _enableDistress),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        // Risk disclosure — always visible when expanded
        Text(
          'Risks you accept:\n'
          '• An adversary can observe when you stop cancelling. A stopped signal '
          'reveals when something happened.\n'
          '• False positives: arrest without device compromise will trigger this.\n'
          '• This is a partial mitigation, not a solution.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        if (settings.distressMessageEnabled) ...[
          SizedBox(height: 16),
          OutlinedButton(
            onPressed: _configureDistress,
            child: Text('Configure'),
          ),
        ],
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // PERIODIC LIVENESS SIGNAL
    Card(child: Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Row(children: [
          Expanded(child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
            Text('Periodic liveness signal',
              style: textTheme.titleSmall),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text('Let trusted peers know when you\'re online.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          ])),
          Switch(value: settings.livenessSignalEnabled,
            onChanged: (v) => v ? _enableLiveness() : settings.setLiveness(false)),
        ]),
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        Text(
          'Risks you accept:\n'
          '• This creates a timing fingerprint. An adversary can correlate '
          'your online patterns.\n'
          '• Your activity periods become observable.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ]),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // ANONYMOUS MASKS (link)
    Card(child: ListTile(
      leading: Icon(Icons.person_outline, color: kSecPurple),
      title: Text('Anonymous masks'),
      subtitle: Text('Masks that cannot be linked to your identity, '
        'even by trusted peers.'),
      trailing: Icon(Icons.chevron_right),
      onTap: () => Navigator.push(context, route(IdentityMasksScreen())),
    )),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

#### 22.10.5 KnownLimitationsScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/known_limitations_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Known Limitations'`.

```
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // Intro
    Text(
      'Understanding these limitations helps you make better decisions '
      'about when and how to use Mesh Infinity.',
      style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),

    SizedBox(height: 20),

    for (final limitation in _limitations)
      _LimitationCard(limitation: limitation),

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

Each `_LimitationCard` is an `ExpansionTile`:
```
ExpansionTile(
  tilePadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 4),
  title: Text(limitation.title, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
  subtitle: Text(limitation.summary,
    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
  children: [
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 16),
      child: Text(limitation.detail, style: textTheme.bodySmall),
    ),
  ],
)
```

Limitations list (title, summary, detail):

1. **Ratchet window after device seizure**
   Summary: "An adversary who seizes a device can read future messages for a period."
   Detail: "Forward secrecy protects past messages. If a device is seized, the adversary holds the current ratchet state and can decrypt future messages until peers stop sending. The window depends on how quickly trusted peers are notified and stop communicating."

2. **Dead man's switch / liveness dilemma**
   Summary: "Liveness signals and total privacy are in direct conflict."
   Detail: "Any periodic signal you send can be observed by adversaries. A pre-committed distress message (in Potential Extremes) is a partial mitigation — but the cancellation pattern itself is observable, and a stopped signal reveals when something happened."

3. **Physical seizure without killswitch**
   Summary: "A sophisticated adversary who images your device prevents the killswitch from firing."
   Detail: "Imaging a powered device in a Faraday cage allows an adversary to read all local data before any remote wipe or killswitch can operate. Full-disk encryption reduces but does not eliminate this risk."

4. **The $5 hammer**
   Summary: "No technical system withstands physical coercion."
   Detail: "If an adversary can compel you to unlock your device or reveal a PIN through force, all technical protections are bypassed. This is outside the scope of any software solution."

5. **Social engineering**
   Summary: "The trust system cannot protect against your own judgment."
   Detail: "If you grant high trust to a malicious party, they gain access to the capabilities that trust level provides. The system protects against technical attacks, not against granting trust to the wrong people."

6. **Profile sharing permanence**
   Summary: "Once a private profile is shared, it cannot be recalled."
   Detail: "When you share your private profile with a trusted peer, that information exists on their device. Revoking trust does not delete the information they already received."

---

#### 22.10.6 NotificationsScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/notifications_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'Notifications'`.

```dart
ListView(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  children: [

    // Tier 1 — always on
    _NotificationTierCard(
      tier: 1,
      title: 'In-app (always on)',
      subtitle: 'Full notifications when Mesh Infinity is open. '
        'Cannot be disabled.',
      statusLabel: 'Active',
      statusColor: kSecGreen,
      expandable: false,
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // Tier 2 — persistent connection (Android)
    _NotificationTierCard(
      tier: 2,
      title: 'Background mesh delivery',
      subtitle: 'Mesh Infinity keeps a background connection alive. '
        'No third-party servers. Best option on Android.',
      enabled: notif.tier2Enabled,
      onToggle: (v) => notif.setTier(2, v),
      note: Platform.isIOS
        ? 'iOS restricts background execution — this tier is limited on iOS.'
        : null,
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // Tier 3 — UnifiedPush
    _NotificationTierCard(
      tier: 3,
      title: 'UnifiedPush',
      subtitle: 'Delivery via a self-hosted or third-party UnifiedPush server. '
        'Requires a distributor app (e.g. ntfy, NextPush).',
      enabled: notif.tier3Enabled,
      onToggle: (v) => notif.setTier(3, v),
      privacyNote: 'Your UnifiedPush server knows when you receive notifications, '
        'but not their content or sender.',
      expandedContent: notif.tier3Enabled
        ? _UnifiedPushConfig(notif: notif)
        : null,
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // Tier 4 — Platform push
    _NotificationTierCard(
      tier: 4,
      title: Platform.isIOS ? 'Apple Push Notifications' : 'Firebase Cloud Messaging',
      subtitle: Platform.isIOS
        ? 'Uses Apple\'s notification service. Works when the app is closed. '
          'Apple sees notification timing but not content.'
        : 'Uses Google\'s notification service. '
          'Google sees notification timing but not content.',
      enabled: notif.tier4Enabled,
      onToggle: (v) => notif.setTier(4, v),
      privacyNote: Platform.isIOS
        ? 'Apple will know when you receive notifications. '
          'Message content is never included in the push payload.'
        : 'Google will know when you receive notifications. '
          'Message content is never included in the push payload.',
      requiresAck: true,
    ),

    SizedBox(height: 8),

    // Push relay config (shown when tier 3 or 4 active)
    if (notif.tier3Enabled || notif.tier4Enabled) ...[
      Divider(height: 1),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      _PushRelayCard(notif: notif),
    ],

    SizedBox(height: 24),
  ],
)
```

**_NotificationTierCard:**
```dart
Card(child: Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Row(children: [
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.secondaryContainer,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
        child: Text('Tier $tier',
          style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer))),
      SizedBox(width: 8),
      Expanded(child: Text(title, style: textTheme.titleSmall)),
      if (!expandable)
        Container(
          padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 3),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
          child: Text(statusLabel ?? 'On',
            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 11, color: kSecGreen,
              fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)))
      else
        Switch(value: enabled ?? false, onChanged: onToggle),
    ]),
    SizedBox(height: 6),
    Text(subtitle,
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    if (note != null) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 4),
      Text(note!, style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecAmber)),
    ],
    if (privacyNote != null && (enabled ?? false)) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Row(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Icon(Icons.info_outline, size: 14, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        SizedBox(width: 4),
        Expanded(child: Text(privacyNote!,
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
      ]),
    ],
    if (expandedContent != null) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      expandedContent!,
    ],
  ]),
))
```

**_UnifiedPushConfig:**
```dart
Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
  Text('UnifiedPush distributor', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  if (notif.unifiedPushDistributor == null)
    Container(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: colorScheme.errorContainer,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
      child: Row(children: [
        Icon(Icons.warning_amber_outlined, size: 18,
          color: colorScheme.onErrorContainer),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        Expanded(child: Text(
          'No UnifiedPush distributor found. Install ntfy or another '
          'distributor app, then return here.',
          style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onErrorContainer))),
      ]),
    )
  else
    ListTile(
      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
      leading: Icon(Icons.check_circle_outline, color: kSecGreen),
      title: Text(notif.unifiedPushDistributor!),
      subtitle: Text(notif.unifiedPushEndpoint ?? 'Registering…'),
      trailing: TextButton(
        onPressed: notif.reregisterUnifiedPush,
        child: Text('Re-register')),
    ),
])
```

**_PushRelayCard:**
```dart
Card(child: Padding(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
    Text('Push relay server', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
    SizedBox(height: 4),
    Text(
      'The push relay bridges between the mesh and your notification service. '
      'It stores only a delivery token and a timestamp — never message content.',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    SegmentedButton<PushRelayType>(
      segments: [
        ButtonSegment(value: PushRelayType.firstParty,
          label: Text('Onii Mediaworks'),
          icon: Icon(Icons.cloud_outlined, size: 14)),
        ButtonSegment(value: PushRelayType.custom,
          label: Text('Self-hosted'),
          icon: Icon(Icons.dns_outlined, size: 14)),
        ButtonSegment(value: PushRelayType.meshNative,
          label: Text('Mesh-native'),
          icon: Icon(Icons.hub_outlined, size: 14)),
      ],
      selected: {notif.pushRelayType},
      onSelectionChanged: (s) => notif.setPushRelayType(s.first),
    ),
    SizedBox(height: 8),
    Text(_relayTypeDescription(notif.pushRelayType),
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    if (notif.pushRelayType == PushRelayType.custom) ...[
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      TextField(
        controller: _relayUrlController,
        decoration: InputDecoration(
          labelText: 'Relay URL',
          hintText: 'https://push.example.com',
        ),
        keyboardType: TextInputType.url,
        onSubmitted: (_) => notif.saveCustomRelay(_relayUrlController.text),
      ),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      FilledButton(
        onPressed: () => notif.saveCustomRelay(_relayUrlController.text),
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 44)),
        child: Text('Save relay URL'),
      ),
    ],
  ]),
))
```

Relay type descriptions:
- firstParty: "Onii Mediaworks operates a first-party relay. No signup needed. Stores only your push token and the timestamp of your last connection."
- custom: "Connect to a relay you host yourself. Full control over retention and access logs."
- meshNative: "Delivery via the mesh itself — no clearnet relay. Most private. Requires the app to be reachable on the mesh to receive notifications."

---

#### 22.10.7 MultiDeviceScreen

**File**: `features/settings/screens/multi_device_screen.dart`

**AppBar**: `'My Devices'`.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('My Devices'),
    actions: [
      IconButton(
        icon: Icon(Icons.add_outlined),
        tooltip: 'Add device',
        onPressed: _openAddDevice,
      ),
    ],
  ),
  body: ListView(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
    children: [

      // Explanation
      Text(
        'All devices registered to your identity. Messages are delivered '
        'to all of them. Keys are synchronized automatically when online.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),

      SizedBox(height: 16),

      // This device
      Card(child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        child: Column(children: [
          Row(children: [
            Icon(Platform.isAndroid ? Icons.phone_android_outlined
              : Platform.isIOS ? Icons.phone_iphone_outlined
              : Icons.computer_outlined,
              size: 20, color: kBrand),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            Expanded(child: Column(
              crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
              children: [
                Row(children: [
                  Text(identity.thisDevice.name, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
                  SizedBox(width: 6),
                  Container(
                    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: kBrand.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
                    child: Text('This device',
                      style: TextStyle(fontSize: 10, color: kBrand,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.w600))),
                ]),
                Text(
                  'Last active: now',
                  style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                    color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
              ],
            )),
            if (identity.thisDevice.isPrimary)
              Tooltip(
                message: 'Primary device — authorizes new device additions',
                child: Icon(Icons.star_outlined, size: 16, color: kSecAmber)),
          ]),
        ]),
      )),

      SizedBox(height: 12),

      // Other devices
      if (identity.otherDevices.isEmpty)
        Padding(
          padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 24),
          child: Column(children: [
            Icon(Icons.devices_outlined, size: 40, color: colorScheme.outline),
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            Text('No other devices',
              style: textTheme.titleSmall),
            SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text('Tap + to add another device.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
              textAlign: TextAlign.center),
          ]),
        )
      else ...[
        Text('Other devices',
          style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        for (final device in identity.otherDevices)
          _DeviceTile(
            device: device,
            onRemove: () => _confirmRemove(device),
          ),
      ],

      SizedBox(height: 24),
    ],
  ),
)
```

**_DeviceTile:**
```dart
Card(
  margin: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
  child: ListTile(
    leading: Icon(
      device.platform == DevicePlatform.android
        ? Icons.phone_android_outlined
        : device.platform == DevicePlatform.ios
          ? Icons.phone_iphone_outlined
          : Icons.computer_outlined,
      size: 22),
    title: Text(device.name),
    subtitle: Text(
      'Last seen: ${_formatRelativeTime(device.lastSeen)}',
      style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
    trailing: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
      if (device.isPrimary)
        Tooltip(
          message: 'Primary device',
          child: Padding(
            padding: EdgeInsets.only(right: 4),
            child: Icon(Icons.star_outlined, size: 16, color: kSecAmber))),
      IconButton(
        icon: Icon(Icons.delete_outline, color: colorScheme.error),
        tooltip: 'Remove device',
        onPressed: () => onRemove(),
      ),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

**Add device flow** (`_openAddDevice`):

Shows `AddDeviceSheet` as a modal bottom sheet:
```dart
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  BottomSheetHandle(),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  Text('Add a device', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
  SizedBox(height: 4),
  Text(
    'Open Mesh Infinity on the other device and scan this QR code.',
    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center),
  SizedBox(height: 20),
  // QR code displaying a time-limited device pairing token
  Center(
    child: Container(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: Colors.white,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
      child: QrImageView(
        data: identity.devicePairingToken,
        size: 200,
        eyeStyle: QrEyeStyle(color: Colors.black),
        dataModuleStyle: QrDataModuleStyle(color: Colors.black)),
    ),
  ),
  SizedBox(height: 12),
  Text(
    'Expires in ${_timeLeft(identity.pairingTokenExpiry)}',
    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
  TextButton(
    onPressed: identity.refreshPairingToken,
    child: Text('Generate new code')),
  SizedBox(height: 16),
])
```

**Remove device confirmation:**
```dart
AlertDialog(
  title: Text('Remove ${device.name}?'),
  content: Text(
    'This device will no longer receive your messages. '
    'A key rotation will happen automatically — contacts will '
    'not see any change, but all session keys will be refreshed.'),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
      child: Text('Cancel')),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: () {
        Navigator.pop(context);
        identity.removeDevice(device.id);
      },
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: colorScheme.error),
      child: Text('Remove')),
  ],
)
```
