- When `true`: replace all animations with instant transitions. The `AnimationController` duration should be `Duration.zero`
- Cover traffic pulsing indicators: replace with static icon when `disableAnimations` is `true`

### 22.35 Gesture System

A consistent gesture vocabulary prevents accidental actions and builds muscle memory.

**Global gestures (active everywhere in AppShell):**

| Gesture | Action | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| Two-finger swipe left from right edge (desktop) | Toggle detail pane | Desktop three-pane only |
| Swipe up on navigation bar (mobile) | Show full nav labels | On Android; standard iOS gesture |

**Chat list gestures:**

| Gesture | Threshold | Action |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| Swipe right on tile | 72px | Archive |
| Swipe left on tile | 72px | Mute / Unmute |
| Long press on tile | 400ms | Long-press action sheet |

**Thread / message gestures:**

| Gesture | Threshold | Action |
|---------|-----------|--------|
| Swipe right on bubble | 56px | Set as reply target |
| Long press on bubble | 400ms | Message action sheet (reactions + actions) |
| Double-tap on bubble | — | Quick-react with ❤️ (most common reaction) |
| Tap on quoted reply | — | Scroll to original message |
| Two-finger pinch on image | — | Expand image fullscreen |

**Community (Garden) gestures:**

| Gesture | Action |
|---------|--------|
| Swipe right on channel | Mark as read |
| Long press on message | Message action sheet (same as DM) |

**Scrolling behaviour:**

- Chat thread: new messages scroll the list to bottom automatically only if the user is already within 200px of the bottom. If scrolled up, a "↓ N new messages" pill appears at the bottom — tapping scrolls to bottom.
- Lists: standard Material 3 overscroll physics on mobile. On iOS, `BouncingScrollPhysics`. On desktop, no overscroll effect.
- All `ScrollController`-based scroll-to-bottom calls use `animateTo` with 300ms `Curves.easeOut`.

#### 22.35.1 Gesture Discovery Hints

Swipe gestures are powerful but invisible. First-time users must be taught them.

**Implementation:** A `GestureHintOverlay` widget that displays a translucent animated hand icon demonstrating the gesture. Shown once per gesture type, stored in local preferences as `gesture_hint_seen_<gesture_id>`.

**When to show:**

| Gesture | Trigger | Hint |
|---------|---------|------|
| Swipe-to-archive (chat list) | First time ConversationListScreen shows ≥3 conversations | Translucent hand slides right on first tile, text: "Swipe right to archive" (auto-dismisses after 3s or on any tap) |
| Swipe-to-reply (thread) | First time user opens a thread with ≥2 messages | Translucent hand slides right on a received bubble, text: "Swipe to reply" |
| Long-press reactions | First time user opens a thread | Pulsing dot on a received bubble + tooltip: "Hold for reactions" (dismisses after 3s) |
| Double-tap react | After first long-press reaction is used | Tooltip: "Double-tap for ❤️" (shown once, inline below the bubble they reacted to) |
| Pinch-to-zoom image | First time user taps an image to open fullscreen viewer | Two-finger pinch icon in center of image, fades after 2s |

**Rules:**
- Each hint is shown exactly once. If the user performs the gesture before the hint fires, the hint is suppressed — they already know.
- Hints never block interaction — they are overlays that dismiss on any touch.
- Respect `MediaQuery.disableAnimations`: show static tooltips instead of animated hands.
- All hint text uses `labelMedium` on a semi-transparent dark pill (`Colors.black87`, `borderRadius: 999`).

---

## Part C — UI/UX Intersection

### 22.41 Security Status Bar

**File**: `shell/security_status_bar.dart`

Persistent banner displayed above all content when a security condition is active.
Height: 0 when inactive. Animates in/out with 200ms `Curves.easeOut`.

**States:**

| State | Condition | Background | Text | Height | Dismissible |
|-------|-----------|------------|------|--------|-------------|
| Hidden | Normal mode, no events | — | — | 0 | N/A |
| LoSec | Any active session in LoSec | `kSecAmber` | "LoSec mode active — fine for everyday use" | 32 | Yes, per session |
| Direct | Any active direct connection | `kSecRed` | "⚠ DIRECT CONNECTION — no mesh routing" | 36 | No, while active |
| Compromised | Message received from compromised peer | `kSecPurple` | "Message from compromised peer — [name]" | 32 | Yes, after tap |
| KeyChange | Key change pending approval | `kBrand` | "[Name]'s key changed — tap to review" | 32 | No, until actioned |

**Widget structure:**
```
AnimatedContainer(
  height: _height,  // 0 or specified height
  duration: 200ms,
  curve: Curves.easeOut,
  color: _color,
  child: SafeArea(
    bottom: false,
    child: Row(
      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
      children: [
        Icon(_icon, size: 16, color: Colors.white),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        Expanded(
          child: Text(
            _message,
            style: TextStyle(
              fontSize: 12,
              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
              color: Colors.white,
            ),
            maxLines: 1,
            overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
          ),
        ),
        if (_dismissible)
          GestureDetector(
            onTap: _onDismiss,
            child: Icon(Icons.close, size: 16, color: Colors.white),
          ),
      ],
    ),
  ),
)
```

**Priority order** when multiple conditions active: Direct > Compromised > KeyChange > LoSec.
Only one bar shown at a time.

### 22.42 Onboarding Flow

**File**: `onboarding/onboarding_screen.dart` — complete replacement.

**Flow**: Welcome → (Create | Import) → First Mask → PIN Setup → Explainer → Done

On first pairing completion (post-onboarding), the safety number screen is presented as a push on the navigation stack before returning to chat.

#### 22.42.1 Screen: Welcome (`_Step.welcome`)

**Scaffold**: no AppBar. `SafeArea`. `SingleChildScrollView`. Horizontal padding: 32. Max width: 420 (via `ConstrainedBox`). `Center`.

```
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min) {

  SizedBox(height: 48)

  // Logo
  Image.asset('../assets/logo.png', width: 80, height: 80)
  // Fallback: Icon(Icons.hub_rounded, size: 80, color: kBrand)

  SizedBox(height: 20)

  // App name
  Text('Mesh Infinity',
    style: textTheme.displaySmall.copyWith(fontWeight: FontWeight.w700))

  SizedBox(height: 8)

  // Tagline
  Text('Encrypted mesh networking for everyone.',
    style: textTheme.bodyLarge.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center)

  SizedBox(height: 48)

  // Primary button
  FilledButton.icon(
    onPressed: _onCreateNew,
    icon: Icon(Icons.person_add_rounded),
    label: Text('Create new identity'),
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 12)

  // Secondary button
  OutlinedButton.icon(
    onPressed: _onImport,
    icon: Icon(Icons.download_rounded),
    label: Text('Import from backup'),
    style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 32)
}
```

**States:**
- Default: both buttons enabled
- Loading (after Create tapped): show `CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2.5)` inside FilledButton, disable both buttons, no spinner on OutlinedButton
- Error: show `_ErrorBanner(message)` between tagline and buttons (SizedBox(height: 16) above banner, SizedBox(height: 16) below)

#### 22.42.2 Screen: Import Backup (`_Step.importBackup`)

Same layout wrapper as Welcome.

```
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min) {

  SizedBox(height: 24)
  _Header(title: 'Import Backup')  // logo 56px + 'Mesh Infinity' + title

  // Error banner if present (with 16px gap below)

  // Instructions
  Text('Line 1: your passphrase\nLines 2+: your backup JSON',
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))

  SizedBox(height: 16)

  TextField(
    controller: _phraseController,
    enabled: !_busy,
    minLines: 4,
    maxLines: 8,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      labelText: 'Passphrase + backup data',
      hintText: 'my-passphrase\n{"version":1,"salt":"..."}',
      alignLabelWithHint: true,
    ),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 20)

  FilledButton(
    onPressed: _busy ? null : _doImport,
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
    child: _busy ? SizedBox(width: 20, height: 20,
      child: CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2)) : Text('Import'),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 12)

  TextButton(
    onPressed: _busy ? null : _goBack,
    child: Text('Back'),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 16)
}
```

#### 22.42.3 Screen: First Mask (`_Step.firstMask`)

```
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min) {

  SizedBox(height: 24)
  _Header(title: 'Your first mask',
    subtitle: 'Mesh Infinity lets you present different faces\nin different contexts — just like in real life.')

  SizedBox(height: 8)

  // Mask name field
  TextField(
    controller: _maskNameController,
    autofocus: true,
    textCapitalization: TextCapitalization.words,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      labelText: 'Mask name',
      hintText: 'e.g. Personal, Work, Alice',
    ),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 16)

  // Color picker
  Text('Avatar color',
    style: textTheme.labelMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))

  SizedBox(height: 8)

  // 8 color circles in a Row, wrapped
  Wrap(spacing: 12, children: [
    for (final color in kMaskAvatarColors)
      GestureDetector(
        onTap: () => setState(() => _selectedColor = color),
        child: Container(
          width: 36, height: 36,
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: color,
            shape: BoxShape.circle,
            border: _selectedColor == color
              ? Border.all(color: colorScheme.onSurface, width: 3)
              : null,
          ),
          child: _selectedColor == color
            ? Icon(Icons.check, size: 18, color: Colors.white)
            : null,
        ),
      ),
  ])

  SizedBox(height: 16)

  // Optional display name
  TextField(
    controller: _displayNameController,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      labelText: 'Display name (optional)',
      hintText: 'Shown to contacts who discover you',
    ),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 8)

  // Hint text
  Text('You can create more masks in Settings anytime.',
    style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))

  SizedBox(height: 24)

  FilledButton(
    onPressed: _maskNameController.text.trim().isEmpty ? null : _goToExplainer,
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
    child: Text('Next'),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 16)
}
```

**Validation**: Next button disabled when mask name field is empty. Enables on any non-whitespace input. No error banner — button state communicates requirement.

#### 22.42.4 Screen: Explainer (`_Step.explainer`)

```
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min) {

  SizedBox(height: 32)

  // Three fact rows
  _FactRow(
    icon: Icons.lock_outline,
    iconColor: kBrand,
    title: 'Your messages are end-to-end encrypted.',
    subtitle: 'Nobody — not even us — can read them.',
  )

  SizedBox(height: 20)

  _FactRow(
    icon: Icons.hub_outlined,
    iconColor: kSecGreen,
    title: 'Your device helps route others\' messages.',
    subtitle: 'They\'re encrypted. You can\'t read them either.',
  )

  SizedBox(height: 20)

  _FactRow(
    icon: Icons.visibility_off_outlined,
    iconColor: kSecAmber,
    title: 'Extra data keeps everyone\'s traffic private.',
    subtitle: 'This uses a small amount of extra bandwidth.',
  )

  SizedBox(height: 40)

  FilledButton.icon(
    onPressed: _finish,
    icon: Icon(Icons.arrow_forward_rounded),
    label: Text('Get Started'),
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 16)
}
```

`_FactRow` widget:
```
Row(
  crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  children: [
    Container(
      width: 48, height: 48,
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: iconColor.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
      ),
      child: Icon(icon, size: 24, color: iconColor),
    ),
    SizedBox(width: 16),
    Expanded(
      child: Column(
        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
        children: [
          SizedBox(height: 4),
          Text(title, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          SizedBox(height: 4),
          Text(subtitle, style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        ],
      ),
    ),
  ],
)
```

`_finish` navigates to `_Step.pinSetup`.

#### 22.42.5 Screen: PIN Setup (`_Step.pinSetup`)

```dart
Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min) {

  SizedBox(height: 32)

  Icon(Icons.pin_outlined, size: 48, color: kBrand)
  SizedBox(height: 16)
  Text('Protect your messages', style: textTheme.titleLarge,
    textAlign: TextAlign.center)
  SizedBox(height: 8)
  Text(
    'A PIN locks your identity behind a second factor. '
    'You can set one now or later in Settings.',
    style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    textAlign: TextAlign.center)

  SizedBox(height: 32)

  // Option A: set PIN now
  FilledButton.icon(
    onPressed: _openPinEntry,
    icon: Icon(Icons.lock_outlined),
    label: Text('Set a PIN'),
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 12)

  // Option B: skip with disclosure
  TextButton(
    onPressed: _skipPin,
    child: Text('Skip for now'),
  )

  SizedBox(height: 16)
}
```

**PIN entry sub-flow** (`_openPinEntry`):

Pushes an inline PIN entry widget within the onboarding scaffold. Collects a 4–16 digit PIN (user choice; not a fixed length), then asks to confirm it:

```dart
Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
  Text('Choose a PIN', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
  SizedBox(height: 12),
  TextField(
    controller: _pinController,
    keyboardType: TextInputType.numberWithOptions(signed: false, decimal: false),
    obscureText: true,
    maxLength: 16,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      labelText: 'PIN',
      counterText: '',
    ),
  ),
  SizedBox(height: 12),
  TextField(
    controller: _pinConfirmController,
    keyboardType: TextInputType.numberWithOptions(signed: false, decimal: false),
    obscureText: true,
    maxLength: 16,
    decoration: InputDecoration(
      labelText: 'Confirm PIN',
      counterText: '',
      errorText: _pinMismatch ? 'PINs do not match' : null,
    ),
  ),
  SizedBox(height: 16),

  // Behaviour checkboxes
  CheckboxListTile(
    contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
    title: Text('Require PIN after screen lock'),
    subtitle: Text('Recommended — prevents access when phone is locked'),
    value: _requireAfterLock,
    onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _requireAfterLock = v!),
    controlAffinity: ListTileControlAffinity.leading,
  ),
  CheckboxListTile(
    contentPadding: EdgeInsets.zero,
    title: Text('Require PIN after inactivity'),
    value: _requireAfterTimeout,
    onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _requireAfterTimeout = v!),
    controlAffinity: ListTileControlAffinity.leading,
  ),
  if (_requireAfterTimeout)
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 40, top: 4),
      child: DropdownButton<Duration>(
        value: _timeoutDuration,
        items: [
          DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(minutes: 1), child: Text('1 minute')),
          DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(minutes: 5), child: Text('5 minutes')),
          DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(minutes: 15), child: Text('15 minutes')),
          DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(hours: 1), child: Text('1 hour')),
        ],
        onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _timeoutDuration = v!),
      ),
    ),

  SizedBox(height: 20),
  FilledButton(
    onPressed: _pinValid ? _confirmPin : null,
    style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
    child: Text('Set PIN'),
  ),
])
```

**Skip confirmation** (`_skipPin`): Show inline disclosure text (not a dialog — keeps user in flow):

```dart
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: colorScheme.errorContainer,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
  child: Column(children: [
    Row(children: [
      Icon(Icons.warning_amber_outlined, size: 18,
        color: colorScheme.onErrorContainer),
      SizedBox(width: 8),
      Expanded(child: Text(
        'Without a PIN, anyone who unlocks your phone can read your messages.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onErrorContainer,
          fontWeight: FontWeight.w500))),
    ]),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    Row(children: [
      Expanded(child: OutlinedButton(
        onPressed: () => setState(() => _showSkipWarning = false),
        child: Text('Set a PIN'))),
      SizedBox(width: 12),
      Expanded(child: TextButton(
        onPressed: _finishOnboarding,
        style: TextButton.styleFrom(foregroundColor: colorScheme.error),
        child: Text('Continue without PIN'))),
    ]),
  ]),
)
```

After PIN is set (or skipped), `_finishOnboarding()` transitions to `AppShell`. The onboarding flow is complete.

#### 22.42.6 Safety Number Screen (post-pairing)

**File**: `features/contacts/screens/safety_number_screen.dart`

This screen is **not part of the onboarding flow** — it is pushed after the first successful pairing completion (whether during or after onboarding). It presents the safety number for the newly paired contact so the user can optionally verify it.

**AppBar**: `'Safety number — [contact name]'`.

```dart
Scaffold(
  appBar: AppBar(
    title: Text('Safety number — ${contact.name}'),
    actions: [
      TextButton(
        onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
        child: Text('Done')),
    ],
  ),
  body: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(children: [

      Icon(Icons.fingerprint_outlined, size: 48, color: kBrand),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text(
        'Verify ${contact.name}\'s identity',
        style: textTheme.titleLarge, textAlign: TextAlign.center),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text(
        'Compare this number with ${contact.name} over a separate channel '
        '— voice, in person, or another messaging app. If it matches, '
        'your connection is secure.',
        style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        textAlign: TextAlign.center),

      SizedBox(height: 32),

      // Safety number display — 12 groups of 5 digits, 3 per row
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12)),
        child: Column(children: [
          for (final row in _safetyNumberRows(contact.safetyNumber))
            Padding(
              padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4),
              child: Row(
                mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
                children: [
                  for (final group in row)
                    Text(group,
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontFamily: 'monospace',
                        fontSize: 18,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
                        letterSpacing: 2,
                        color: colorScheme.onSurface)),
                ]),
            ),
        ]),
      ),

      SizedBox(height: 24),

      // Verify action
      FilledButton.icon(
        onPressed: _markVerified,
        icon: Icon(Icons.verified_outlined),
        label: Text('Numbers match — mark verified'),
        style: FilledButton.styleFrom(minimumSize: Size(double.infinity, 52)),
      ),

      SizedBox(height: 12),

      TextButton(
        onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
        child: Text('Verify later'),
      ),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

`_safetyNumberRows` splits the 60-digit safety number into 12 groups of 5, then arranges them as 4 rows × 3 groups.

Verification status is stored in the contact's trust record. A verified contact shows a `verified` chip in `ContactDetailScreen` (§22.8.2).

---

### 22.43 Security Event Flows

#### 22.43.1 Key Change Pending

Triggered when a known contact presents a new key.

**In-app banner** (SecurityStatusBar variant — blue):
```
"[Name]'s key has changed — tap to review"
→ onTap: push KeyChangeReviewScreen(peerId: id)
```

**KeyChangeReviewScreen:**

**AppBar**: `'Key change — [contact name]'`.

```
Scaffold(
  body: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(children: [
      // Info
      Icon(Icons.key_outlined, size: 48, color: kBrand),
      SizedBox(height: 16),
      Text('[Contact name] has a new device key.',
        style: textTheme.titleLarge, textAlign: TextAlign.center),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text('This may be because they got a new device, reinstalled the app, '
        'or rotated their key for security.',
        style: textTheme.bodyMedium.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
        textAlign: TextAlign.center),

      // WoT corroboration count — shown only when N > 0
      if (keyChange.wotCorroborators > 0) ...[
        SizedBox(height: 12),
        Container(
          padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
          decoration: BoxDecoration(
            color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.10),
            borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
          child: Row(children: [
            Icon(Icons.people_outline, size: 16, color: kSecGreen),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            Expanded(child: Text(
              '\${keyChange.wotCorroborators} trusted contact\${keyChange.wotCorroborators == 1 ? '' : 's'} '
              'have verified [name]\'s new key.',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: kSecGreen))),
          ]),
        ),
      ],

      SizedBox(height: 24),

      // Option A: Verify via safety number
      Card(child: Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Row(children: [
            Icon(Icons.verified_outlined, size: 20, color: kSecGreen),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            Text('Verify out-of-band (recommended)', style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          ]),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          Text(
            'Ask [name] to share their safety number via a separate channel. '
            'Compare it to the number below.',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          SizedBox(height: 12),

          // Safety number for new key
          Container(
            padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
            child: Column(children: [
              for (final row in _safetyNumberRows(keyChange.newKeySafetyNumber))
                Padding(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 2),
                  child: Row(
                    mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.spaceEvenly,
                    children: [
                      for (final group in row)
                        Text(group,
                          style: TextStyle(
                            fontFamily: 'monospace', fontSize: 15,
                            fontWeight: FontWeight.w700, letterSpacing: 2)),
                    ]),
                ),
            ]),
          ),

          SizedBox(height: 12),
          Row(children: [
            Expanded(child: FilledButton.icon(
              onPressed: _markVerifiedAndApprove,
              icon: Icon(Icons.check_outlined, size: 16),
              label: Text('Numbers match'),
              style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: kSecGreen),
            )),
            SizedBox(width: 8),
            Expanded(child: OutlinedButton.icon(
              onPressed: _openMismatchFlow,
              icon: Icon(Icons.close_outlined, size: 16),
              label: Text('Mismatch'),
              style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(foregroundColor: colorScheme.error),
            )),
          ]),
        ]),
      )),

      SizedBox(height: 12),

      // Option B: In-band (with friction)
      TextButton(
        onPressed: _openInBandApproval,
        child: Text('Approve without out-of-band verification'),
        style: TextButton.styleFrom(foregroundColor: colorScheme.error),
      ),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

**Safety number mismatch flow** (`_openMismatchFlow`):
```dart
AlertDialog(
  title: Row(children: [
    Icon(Icons.shield_outlined, color: colorScheme.error),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Text('Numbers don\'t match'),
  ]),
  content: Text(
    'If the safety numbers don\'t match, this key change may not be '
    'legitimate.\n\nPossible reasons:\n'
    '• You or [name] are reading a different key.\n'
    '• This is an impersonation attempt.\n\n'
    'Do not approve this key change until you can verify it through '
    'a trusted separate channel.'),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
      child: Text('Keep pending — verify later')),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: () { Navigator.pop(context); _flagSuspicious(); },
      style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: colorScheme.error),
      child: Text('Flag as suspicious')),
  ],
)
```

`_flagSuspicious()` marks the key change as suspicious in the trust record, shows a warning chip in `ContactDetailScreen`, and sends a local notification: *"Key change from [name] flagged as suspicious — verify when possible."*

**In-band approval confirmation dialog:**
```
Dialog(
  // barrierDismissible: false
  child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(20),
    child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
      Icon(Icons.warning_rounded, size: 40, color: kSecAmber),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text('Approve without verification', style: textTheme.titleMedium),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text(
        'You are approving a key change without confirming it out-of-band. '
        'If this is an attack, you are helping someone impersonate [name].\n\n'
        'This cannot be undone. This approval will be permanently marked as '
        'unverified in the record.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text('A 72-hour waiting period will begin. You can cancel during this time.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      SizedBox(height: 20),
      Row(children: [
        Expanded(child: OutlinedButton(
          onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context),
          child: Text('Cancel'))),
        SizedBox(width: 12),
        Expanded(child: FilledButton(
          onPressed: _startInBandWait,
          style: FilledButton.styleFrom(backgroundColor: kSecAmber),
          child: Text('Start 72-hour wait'))),
      ]),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

#### 22.43.2 Compromised Peer Notification

**Non-dismissible banner** (red):
```
Container(
  color: kSecRed,
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 10),
  child: Row(children: [
    Icon(Icons.shield_outlined, color: Colors.white, size: 18),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Expanded(child: Text(
      '[Name] has been flagged as permanently compromised',
      style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: FontWeight.w500))),
    TextButton(
      onPressed: _openContact,
      style: TextButton.styleFrom(foregroundColor: Colors.white),
      child: Text('Review', style: TextStyle(fontSize: 12))),
  ]),
)
```

Only dismissible after user taps "Review" and views the contact detail screen.

**Compromised peer action guidance:** When the user navigates to ContactDetailScreen for a Compromised peer, show a guidance card above the normal contact content:

```dart
Card(
  color: kSecRed.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
  child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
    child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
      Row(children: [
        Icon(Icons.warning_rounded, color: kSecRed, size: 20),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        Text('This contact is compromised', style: textTheme.titleSmall.copyWith(color: kSecRed)),
      ]),
      SizedBox(height: 8),
      Text(
        'Their device may be in someone else\'s hands. '
        'Messages you send may be read by an adversary.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      SizedBox(height: 12),
      Text('What you can do:', style: textTheme.labelMedium),
      SizedBox(height: 4),
      _ActionItem(icon: Icons.block, label: 'Block this contact',
        subtitle: 'Stop receiving messages from them.',
        onTap: () => _blockContact()),
      _ActionItem(icon: Icons.delete_outline, label: 'Delete conversation history',
        subtitle: 'Remove local copies of your messages with them.',
        onTap: () => _confirmDeleteHistory()),
      _ActionItem(icon: Icons.warning_amber_outlined, label: 'Warn your contacts',
        subtitle: 'Let people you both know that this identity is compromised.',
        onTap: () => _showWarnContactsSheet()),
      _ActionItem(icon: Icons.person_add_outlined, label: 'Re-pair if they have a new device',
        subtitle: 'If this is someone you trust who got a new device, pair fresh.',
        onTap: () => _openPairScreen()),
    ]),
  ),
)
```

The `_showWarnContactsSheet` opens a bottom sheet listing mutual trusted contacts with checkboxes — the user selects who to notify, and a brief warning message is sent via trusted channel: *"[Your name] has flagged [compromised name] as compromised. Exercise caution."*

---

### 22.44 System Tray

#### 22.44.1 Tray Icon States

| State | Icon | Tooltip |
|-------|------|---------|
| Connected, normal | `logo.png` full opacity | "Mesh Infinity — Connected" |
| Connected, LoSec | `logo.png` + amber dot overlay | "Mesh Infinity — LoSec mode" |
| Connected, direct | `logo.png` + red dot overlay | "Mesh Infinity — Direct mode" |
| VPN active | `logo.png` + lock badge | "Mesh Infinity — VPN active" |
| Connecting | `logo.png` pulsing | "Mesh Infinity — Connecting..." |
| Disconnected | `logo.png` 40% opacity | "Mesh Infinity — Disconnected" |
| Error | `logo.png` + red badge | "Mesh Infinity — Error" |

#### 22.44.2 Tray Popup

Width: 320px. Opens anchored to tray icon.

```
TrayPopup(
  width: 320,
  child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [

    // ── HEADER ──
    Container(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 16, 16, 12),
      child: Row(children: [
        MaskAvatar(mask: activeMask, size: MaskAvatarSize.medium),
        SizedBox(width: 12),
        Expanded(child: Column(
          crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Text(activeMask.name, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
          Row(children: [
            Container(width: 8, height: 8,
              decoration: BoxDecoration(color: _connectionColor, shape: BoxShape.circle)),
            SizedBox(width: 6),
            Text(_connectionSummary,
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          ]),
        ])),
        IconButton(
          icon: Icon(Icons.open_in_new_outlined, size: 18),
          tooltip: 'Open Mesh Infinity',
          onPressed: _openMainWindow),
      ]),
    ),

    // Security status (only if not normal)
    if (securityMode != ConnectionMode.standard)
      Container(
        margin: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 0, 12, 8),
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 6),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: _securityColor.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
        child: Row(children: [
          Icon(_securityIcon, size: 14, color: _securityColor),
          SizedBox(width: 6),
          Text(_securityLabel,
            style: TextStyle(fontSize: 12, color: _securityColor)),
        ]),
      ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // ── THREAT CONTEXT ──
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 12, 16, 8),
      child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
        Text('Threat Context',
          style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
        SizedBox(height: 8),
        Row(children: [
          _ThreatChip(label: 'Normal', level: ThreatContext.normal,
            current: threatContext, onTap: () => _setThreat(normal)),
          SizedBox(width: 6),
          _ThreatChip(label: 'Elevated', level: ThreatContext.elevated,
            current: threatContext, onTap: () => _setThreat(elevated)),
          SizedBox(width: 6),
          _ThreatChip(label: 'Critical', level: ThreatContext.critical,
            current: threatContext, onTap: () => _setThreat(critical)),
        ]),
      ]),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // ── QUICK STATS ──
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 12, 16, 12),
      child: Row(children: [
        _TrayStatChip(icon: Icons.upload_outlined, value: _formatBytes(bytesSent)),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        _TrayStatChip(icon: Icons.download_outlined, value: _formatBytes(bytesRecv)),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        _TrayStatChip(icon: Icons.hub_outlined, value: '${tunnels}t'),
        SizedBox(width: 8),
        _TrayStatChip(icon: Icons.people_outline, value: '${peers}p'),
      ]),
    ),

    Divider(height: 1),

    // ── EXIT NODE (if configured or VPN mode) ──
    if (exitNodeEnabled || vpnMode)
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 12, 16, 0),
        child: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start, children: [
          Text('Exit Node',
            style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
          SizedBox(height: 8),
          // Dropdown showing current exit node or "None"
          DropdownButton<String>(
            value: currentExitNodeId,
            isExpanded: true,
            underline: SizedBox(),
            hint: Text('None — local routing'),
            items: [
              DropdownMenuItem(value: null, child: Text('None')),
              for (final node in availableExitNodes)
                DropdownMenuItem(value: node.id, child: Text(node.name)),
            ],
            onChanged: (v) => _setExitNode(v),
          ),
          if (currentExitNodeId != null) ...[
            SizedBox(height: 8),
            DropdownButton<String>(
              value: currentProfileId,
              isExpanded: true,
              underline: SizedBox(),
              hint: Text('Select profile'),
              items: [
                for (final profile in currentExitNode!.profiles)
                  DropdownMenuItem(value: profile.id,
                    child: Text(profile.name)),
              ],
              onChanged: (v) => _setProfile(v),
            ),
          ],
        ]),
      ),

    if (exitNodeEnabled || vpnMode) Divider(height: 24),

    // ── ACTIVE CONNECTIONS ──
    if (activeConversations.isNotEmpty) ...[
      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 0, 16, 4),
        child: Text('Active',
          style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      ),
      for (final conv in activeConversations.take(3))
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
          leading: MaskAvatar(name: conv.peerName, size: MaskAvatarSize.small),
          title: Text(conv.peerName, style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          trailing: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
            if (conv.mode == ConnectionMode.loSec)
              Container(width: 6, height: 6,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(color: kSecAmber, shape: BoxShape.circle)),
            if (conv.mode == ConnectionMode.direct)
              Container(width: 6, height: 6,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(color: kSecRed, shape: BoxShape.circle)),
            SizedBox(width: 4),
            Icon(Icons.chat_bubble_outline, size: 14,
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
          ]),
          onTap: () { _openMainWindow(); _navigateToConversation(conv.id); },
        ),
      if (activeConversations.length > 3)
        Padding(
          padding: EdgeInsets.only(left: 16, bottom: 4),
          child: Text('+${activeConversations.length - 3} more',
            style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant))),
      Divider(height: 1),
    ],

    // ── QUICK ACTIONS ──
    Padding(
      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 4),
      child: Column(children: [
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          leading: Icon(Icons.notifications_off_outlined, size: 20),
          title: Text('Mute notifications', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          trailing: DropdownButton<Duration>(
            value: muteUntil,
            underline: SizedBox(),
            isDense: true,
            hint: Text('Off', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
            items: [
              DropdownMenuItem(value: null, child: Text('Off')),
              DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(hours: 1), child: Text('1 hour')),
              DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(hours: 8), child: Text('8 hours')),
              DropdownMenuItem(value: Duration(days: 1), child: Text('1 day')),
            ],
            onChanged: (v) => _setMute(v),
          ),
        ),
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          leading: Icon(Icons.settings_outlined, size: 20),
          title: Text('Settings', style: textTheme.bodySmall),
          onTap: () { _openMainWindow(); _navigateTo(AppSection.settings); },
        ),
        ListTile(
          dense: true,
          leading: Icon(Icons.power_settings_new_outlined, size: 20,
            color: colorScheme.error),
          title: Text('Disconnect', style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
            color: colorScheme.error)),
          onTap: _confirmDisconnect,
        ),
      ]),
    ),

  ]),
)
```

**_ThreatChip:**
```
GestureDetector(
  onTap: onTap,
  child: Container(
    padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 5),
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: level == current
        ? _threatColor(level).withValues(alpha: 0.15)
        : colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6),
      border: Border.all(
        color: level == current
          ? _threatColor(level)
          : Colors.transparent,
        width: 1.5)),
    child: Text(label, style: TextStyle(
      fontSize: 11, fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
      color: level == current
        ? _threatColor(level) : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
  ),
)
// Threat colors: Normal=kSecGreen, Elevated=kSecAmber, Critical=kSecRed
```

**_TrayStatChip:**
```
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 4),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6)),
  child: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Icon(icon, size: 12, color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
    SizedBox(width: 3),
    Text(value, style: TextStyle(fontSize: 11,
      color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
  ]),
)
```

---

### 22.45 Android Foreground Service Notification

The MetricsScreen (§22.9.2) is accessible at all tiers. When accessed from Settings
(Tier 1, Network+ not enabled), it shows all metrics but with no controls and an
explanatory header.

Add to MetricsScreen:

```dart
// Show this banner when networkEnabled == false:
if (!features.networkEnabled)
  Container(
    margin: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 16, 16, 0),
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
    ),
    child: Row(children: [
      Icon(Icons.info_outline, size: 18,
        color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      SizedBox(width: 10),
      Expanded(child: Text(
        'Your node is running and helping the mesh. '
        'Enable Network controls in Settings to configure transports and exit nodes.',
        style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
          color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant),
      )),
    ]),
  ),
```

All metrics data is still shown — the banner just explains the read-only context.

### 22.46 Android Quick Settings Tile

Android requires a persistent notification for foreground services. Mesh Infinity
runs a foreground service to keep the mesh node alive in the background. The
notification must be useful, not just a legal placeholder.

**Notification channel:**
- Channel ID: `mesh_infinity_service`
- Channel name: "Mesh Infinity"
- Importance: `IMPORTANCE_LOW` (no sound, no heads-up)
- Description: "Keeps Mesh Infinity running in the background"

**Notification layout:**

```
[App icon — small]   Mesh Infinity
                     Connected · 3 tunnels · 12 peers

[Action 1: Threat]   [Action 2: Mute]   [Action 3: Open]
```

**Notification states:**

| State | Title | Body |
|-------|-------|------|
| Connected, normal | "Mesh Infinity" | "Connected · {N} tunnels · {M} peers" |
| Connected, LoSec active | "Mesh Infinity — LoSec mode" | "Faster connection active — fine for everyday use" |
| Connected, direct mode | "⚠ Mesh Infinity — Direct mode" | "No mesh routing — your location is visible" |
| Connected, VPN active | "Mesh Infinity — VPN active" | "Routing through {exit node name}" |
| Connecting | "Mesh Infinity" | "Connecting to mesh..." |
| Degraded | "Mesh Infinity — Limited connection" | "Some transports unavailable" |
| Disconnected | "Mesh Infinity — Offline" | "Tap to reconnect" |

**Quick action buttons** (max 3 on Android — shown in compact notification):

*Default (connected, normal):*
```
[Threat: Normal ▾]   [Mute 1h]   [Open]
```

*When LoSec active:*
```
[End LoSec]   [Mute 1h]   [Open]
```

*When direct mode active:*
```
[End Direct]   [Mute 1h]   [Open]
```

*When VPN active:*
```
[Disconnect VPN]   [Change exit]   [Open]
```

**Expanded notification** (when user pulls down):

```
[App icon]   Mesh Infinity
             Connected · 3 tunnels · 12 peers
             Cover traffic: 2.3 MB today

[Threat context selector: Normal | Elevated | Critical]

[Action: Mute 1h]   [Action: Settings]   [Action: Open]
```

The threat context selector in the expanded notification is a set of three
`RemoteViews` buttons, not a spinner — each tap sends a `PendingIntent` to the
service. Selected state shown with a different background tint.

**Implementation note:**
The foreground service notification is managed entirely by the Rust backend via a
Flutter platform channel. The Flutter UI sends notification content updates to
Rust; Rust manages the `NotificationManager` calls natively via JNI. Flutter
never manages the foreground service notification directly.

**File:** `platforms/android/app/src/main/kotlin/MeshNotificationService.kt`

**Notification ID:** `1` (persistent, never cancelled while service runs)

**Start foreground call:** On `BackendBridge.open()`, the Rust layer calls
`startForeground(1, notification)` before any mesh initialization.

### 22.47 iOS Lock Screen Widget and Dynamic Island

iOS does not have foreground services. Controls surface through:

**A. Lock Screen / Notification Center widget (iOS 16+)**

Live Activity widget using ActivityKit. Shows mesh status on the Lock Screen
and in Notification Center while the app is backgrounded.

```
╔════════════════════════════════╗
║  [Logo]  Mesh Infinity         ║
║  ● Connected · 3 tunnels       ║
║  Normal threat context         ║
╚════════════════════════════════╝
```

Tapping opens the app to the Network section (if enabled) or Settings.

**Live Activity states:**
- Connected: green dot, tunnel count, threat context
- LoSec: amber dot, "LoSec mode active"
- Direct: red dot, "⚠ Direct mode"
- VPN: lock icon, exit node name
- Offline: gray dot, "Not connected"

Live Activity ends when: app moves to foreground OR user explicitly ends it.
Live Activity starts when: app moves to background AND mesh is connected.

**B. Dynamic Island (iPhone 14 Pro and later)**

Compact view (pill):
```
[Logo]  ● Connected
```

Expanded view (long press):
```
╔════════════════════════════════════╗
║  [Logo]  Mesh Infinity             ║
║          ● Connected · 3 tunnels   ║
║                                    ║
║  [Normal]  [Elevated]  [Critical]  ║
╚════════════════════════════════════╝
```

Tapping the compact view opens expanded. Tapping expanded opens the app.
The three threat context buttons in expanded view send background tasks via
`BGTaskScheduler` that update threat context in the running extension.

**C. Notification action buttons**

When a notification arrives (via APNs Tier 3 or 4), include action buttons:

```
[Mesh Infinity notification]
Alice: "Hey, are you free?"

[Reply]   [Mark as read]
```

Reply action opens the inline reply UI directly in Notification Center — same
as iMessage. The reply is sent via a `UNNotificationServiceExtension` that
communicates with the main app process via App Group shared container.

**Implementation note:**
Live Activities require the `ActivityKit` framework (iOS 16.1+). The widget
extension is a separate target: `MeshInfinityWidgetExtension`. It receives
updates from the main app via `Activity.update()`. On devices without Live
Activity support (older iOS, iPad), these surfaces simply do not appear —
graceful degradation, no error state.

**File:** `platforms/apple/MeshInfinityWidgetExtension/`

### 22.48 Navigation Flow Map

Every navigation transition:

```
App launch
  → has identity? → PinScreen(mode: unlock) → AppShell (chat section)
  → no identity  → OnboardingScreen
    → create/import → FirstMaskScreen → PinSetupScreen → ExplainerScreen → AppShell
    → first pairing completion → SafetyNumberScreen (push, then pop back to chat)

AppShell
  ├── Chat tab
  │   ├── ConversationListScreen
  │   │   ├── [mask avatar tap]   → MaskSwitcherSheet (bottom sheet)
  │   │   ├── [search icon]       → ConversationSearchScreen (push)
  │   │   ├── [requests icon]     → MessageRequestsScreen (push, badge when > 0)
  │   │   ├── [compose icon]      → CreateRoomScreen (modal)
  │   │   ├── [swipe right tile]  → archive (in-place, snackbar undo)
  │   │   ├── [swipe left tile]   → mute/unmute (in-place, snackbar)
  │   │   └── [long press tile]   → action sheet
  │   └── ThreadScreen
  │       ├── [peer name/avatar]  → ContactDetailScreen (push)
  │       ├── [call icon]         → CallScreen (push)
  │       ├── [swipe right msg]   → set reply target (in-composer preview)
  │       ├── [double-tap msg]    → quick ❤️ reaction (in-place)
  │       ├── [long press msg]    → message action sheet (reactions + actions)
  │       │   ├── Reply           → set reply target (in-composer)
  │       │   ├── Forward         → ForwardSheet (bottom sheet, contact picker)
  │       │   ├── Edit            → edit mode (in-composer header)
  │       │   └── Delete          → DeleteMessageDialog (modal)
  │       ├── [attachment icon]   → attachment options sheet
  │       └── [more menu]         → thread menu sheet
  │           ├── Search          → (inline search bar in thread)
  │           ├── Disappearing    → DisappearingMessagesSheet
  │           └── Connection mode → ConnectionModeSheet
  │               ├── LoSec       → inline amber chip (no navigation)
  │               └── Direct      → DirectConfirmDialog (modal)
  │
  ├── Garden tab
  │   ├── CommunityListScreen
  │   │   └── [tap community]     → CommunityScreen (push mobile, detail pane desktop)
  │   └── CommunityScreen
  │       ├── [channel tap]       → ChannelScreen (if mobile)
  │       ├── [settings icon]     → CommunitySettingsScreen (push, admin only)
  │       │   └── [edit profile]  → GardenProfileEditScreen (push)
  │       └── [member tap]        → ProfilePreviewScreen (push)
  │           └── [View contact]  → ContactDetailScreen (push)
  │   └── [add icon]              → JoinCreateCommunityScreen (modal)
  │
  ├── Files tab
  │   ├── FilesScreen (tabbed: Transfers | Storage)
  │   │   └── [upload icon]       → PublishFileSheet (bottom sheet)
  │   └── [send icon top]         → SendFileSheet (bottom sheet)
  │
  ├── Contacts tab
  │   ├── ContactListScreen
  │   │   └── [tap contact]       → ContactDetailScreen (push mobile, detail pane desktop)
  │   └── ContactDetailScreen
  │       ├── [avatar tap]        → ProfilePreviewScreen (push)
  │       ├── [chat action]       → ThreadScreen (push to chat)
  │       ├── [files action]      → SendFileSheet (bottom sheet)
  │       ├── [call action]       → CallScreen (push)
  │       ├── [verify]            → SafetyNumberScreen (push)
  │       ├── [key change]        → KeyChangeReviewScreen (push)
  │       └── [trust level]       → TrustPromotionSheet (bottom sheet with explanation)
  │   └── [add icon]              → PairContactScreen (modal)
  │       └── (5 tabs: QR/Code/Link/Bluetooth/Import)
  │           └── pairing success → SafetyNumberScreen (push)
  │
  ├── Network tab
  │   ├── NetworkScreen
  │   │   ├── [metrics link]      → MetricsScreen (push)
  │   │   ├── [exit node tile]    → ExitNodeScreen (push)
  │   │   └── [app connector]     → AppConnectorScreen (push, Network Controls tier only)
  │   ├── MetricsScreen (push)
  │   ├── ExitNodeScreen (push)
  │   └── AppConnectorScreen (push)
  │
  └── Settings tab
      ├── SettingsScreen
      │   ├── [identity tile]     → IdentityMasksScreen (push)
      │   │   ├── [mask tile]     → MaskEditScreen (push)
      │   │   └── [create mask]   → MaskCreateSheet (bottom sheet)
      │   ├── [notifications]     → NotificationsScreen (push)
      │   ├── [devices]           → MultiDeviceScreen (push)
      │   │   └── [add device]    → AddDeviceSheet (bottom sheet, QR code)
      │   ├── [infinet]           → InfinetScreen (push, if in Infinet)
      │   │   ├── [Settings tab]  → ACL + DNS + join policy
      │   │   │   ├── [add ACL rule]  → AclRuleSheet (bottom sheet)
      │   │   │   └── [add DNS record] → DnsRecordSheet (bottom sheet)
      │   │   └── [Tasks tab]     → task list (can_orchestrate only)
      │   │       └── [new task]  → TaskCreateScreen (push)
      │   ├── [node management]   → NodeManagementScreen (push, server/dual mode only)
      │   ├── [emergency erase]   → EmergencyEraseScreen (push)
      │   ├── [potential extremes] → PotentialExtremesScreen (push)
      │   ├── [known limitations] → KnownLimitationsScreen (push)
      │   ├── [app pin]           → PinScreen(mode: setup/change/remove) (push)
      │   └── [export backup]     → BackupTypeSheet (bottom sheet) → SaveFilePicker (system)
      │
      └── Security event banners (tap)
          ├── LoSec banner        → current thread ConnectionModeSheet
          ├── Direct banner       → (no navigation — informational)
          ├── Compromised banner  → ContactDetailScreen (push)
          └── Key change banner   → KeyChangeReviewScreen (push)
```

---

### 22.49 Empty States Summary

All empty states use the `EmptyState` widget (§22.4.7). Pattern: icon + title + body + optional action.

| Screen | Icon | Title | Body | Action |
|--------|------|-------|------|--------|
| ConversationList | chat_bubble_outline | "No conversations yet" | "Pair with someone to start chatting." | "Add a contact" → contacts |
| ThreadScreen | waving_hand_outlined | "No messages yet" | "Say hello!" | none |
| MessageRequests | mark_unread_chat_alt_outlined | "No pending requests" | "Message requests from new contacts will appear here." | none |
| ConversationSearch (idle) | search | "Search your messages" | "Type to search across all conversations." | none |
| ConversationSearch (no results) | search_off_outlined | "No results" | "No messages match \"[query]\"." | none |
| CommunityList | groups_outlined | "No communities yet" | "Join or create one to get started." | "Join or create" |
| Files/Transfers | folder_open_outlined | "No transfers" | "Tap the upload icon to send a file." | none |
| Files/Storage | cloud_outlined | "No published files" | "Publish files to the mesh storage network." | "Publish a file" |
| ContactList | people_outline | "No contacts yet" | "Pair with someone to add them." | "Add a contact" |
| NetworkScreen/discovered | device_hub_outlined | "No local peers discovered" | "Enable mDNS to discover peers on your network." | none |
| ExitNodeScreen | route_outlined | "No exit nodes available" | "Trusted contacts who offer exit node services will appear here." | none |
| AppConnectorScreen | apps_outlined | "No apps selected" / "No exclusions" | contextual | none |
| MultiDeviceScreen | devices_outlined | "No other devices" | "Tap + to add another device." | none |

---

### 22.50 Loading States Summary

All lists use shimmer tiles while loading. Shimmer: animated gradient from `surfaceContainerHighest` to `surfaceContainerHighest.withValues(alpha: 0.5)` and back, 1.5s loop. Respect `MediaQuery.disableAnimations` — use static placeholder when true.

| Screen | Shimmer count | Shimmer height |
|--------|--------------|----------------|
| ConversationList | 6 | 72px |
| ThreadScreen | centre spinner (no shimmer) | n/a |
| MessageRequests | 3 | 88px |
| CommunityList | 4 | 72px |
| Files/Transfers | 3 | 80px |
| ContactList | 5 | 68px |
| NetworkScreen stats | card-level skeleton | n/a |
| ExitNodeScreen | 3 | 80px |
| MultiDeviceScreen | 2 | 68px |
| InfinetScreen/Members | 4 | 68px |
| InfinetScreen/Devices | 4 | 72px |
| InfinetScreen/Tasks | 3 | 72px |
| NotificationsScreen | static skeleton cards | n/a |
| NodeManagementScreen | card-level skeleton | n/a |

---

### 22.51 Error States Summary

All error states use the `ErrorBanner` widget (§22.4.8) inline within the screen. Never use a full-screen error for recoverable errors.

Error strings come from `bridge.getLastError()`. Fallback strings:

| Context | Fallback string | Retry? |
|---------|----------------|--------|
| Create identity fails | "Failed to create identity. Please try again." | Yes |
| Import backup fails | "Import failed. Check your passphrase and backup data." | Yes |
| Send message fails | "Message not sent. Will retry when connection is available." | No — auto-retry |
| Pair contact fails | "Pairing failed. Check the code and try again." | Yes |
| Load conversations fails | "Couldn't load conversations. Pull down to retry." | No — pull-to-refresh |
| Load contacts fails | "Couldn't load contacts. Pull down to retry." | No — pull-to-refresh |
| Export backup fails | "Backup export failed. Ensure you have storage permission." | Yes |
| Tor unavailable | "Tor transport unavailable. Check your network connection." | No — auto-retry |
| Exit node connect fails | "Couldn't connect to exit node. It may be offline." | Yes |
| VPN enable fails | "Couldn't enable Mesh VPN. Check system VPN permissions." | Yes |
| Device add fails | "Device pairing failed. The code may have expired — generate a new one." | No |
| Infinet load fails | "Couldn't load Infinet data. Check your mesh connection." | Yes |
| ACL save fails | "Failed to save rule. Try again." | Yes |
| DNS record save fails | "Failed to save DNS record. Try again." | Yes |
| Node management load fails | "Couldn't load node data. The management interface may be unavailable." | Yes |
| UnifiedPush registration fails | "UnifiedPush registration failed. Check your distributor app is running." | Yes |
| Task offer fails to deliver | "Couldn't reach worker device. They may be offline." | Yes |
| Task credential rejected | "Task access denied. The worker's credential may have expired." | No |
| Task result not received | "No result received. The task may have timed out." | No |
| Task create fails | "Couldn't create task. Check your Infinet connection." | Yes |
| Voice note recording fails | "Couldn't start recording. Check microphone permissions." | No |
| Call connect fails | "Call failed. The contact may be offline." | No |

---


### 22.52 Remote Session UI

UI for MNRDP sessions (§22.2.1), MISLP purpose sessions (§18.6), and the purpose launcher. Two invariants apply to everything in this section:

1. **The user always knows which device's context they are in.** Every session surface carries a persistent `purpose_colour` indicator. This cannot be hidden, minimised, or overridden by the remote session.
2. **Remote session UI never takes over the whole shell.** The status bar, nav bar, and session switcher remain accessible. The only exception is explicit user-initiated fullscreen.

---

#### 22.52.1 MnrdpView — Full Desktop Mode

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/mnrdp_view.dart`

Base MNRDP rendering widget. Used for `FullDesktop` and `Contained` windowing.

```dart
class MnrdpView extends StatefulWidget {
  final MnrdpSession session;
  final Color purposeColour;    // from DevicePurpose.purpose_colour
  final bool showChrome;
  final bool fullscreen;
}
```

**Layout:**

```dart
Stack(fit: StackFit.expand, children: [

  // 1. Frame canvas
  _MnrdpFrameCanvas(session: session),

  // 2. Purpose border — always visible, IgnorePointer so it never eats touches
  Positioned.fill(child: IgnorePointer(child: DecoratedBox(
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      border: Border.all(
        color: purposeColour,
        width: fullscreen ? 0 : 4.0,
        strokeAlign: BorderSide.strokeAlignInside,
      ),
    ),
  ))),

  // 3. Top-edge purpose stripe in fullscreen (3px, matches Qubes convention)
  if (fullscreen)
    Positioned(top: 0, left: 0, right: 0,
      child: IgnorePointer(
        child: Container(height: 3, color: purposeColour))),

  // 4. Chrome bar
  if (showChrome)
    Positioned(top: 0, left: 0, right: 0,
      child: _MnrdpChromeBar(session: session, colour: purposeColour)),

  // 5. Keyboard capture indicator (top-right, when keyboard is captured)
  if (session.keyboardCaptured)
    Positioned(top: showChrome ? 48 : 8, right: 8,
      child: IgnorePointer(child: _KeyboardCaptureTag(colour: purposeColour))),
])
```

**`_MnrdpFrameCanvas`:**

Renders decoded frames using a `CustomPainter`. Only dirty rectangles from `damage_rects` are redrawn. Frame decode runs in a dedicated `Isolate`; the UI thread only receives decoded `ui.Image` objects. Target budget: 16ms render thread, 12ms decode thread. Keyframes replace the entire canvas; delta frames update only their damage rects.

**`_MnrdpChromeBar`:**

```dart
Container(
  height: 40,
  color: purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.92),
  child: Row(children: [
    SizedBox(width: 12),
    Container(width: 10, height: 10,
      decoration: BoxDecoration(color: purposeColour, shape: BoxShape.circle,
        border: Border.all(color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.5), width: 1.5))),
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Text('${session.deviceName} · ${session.purposeTag}',
      style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12,
        fontWeight: FontWeight.w600)),
    Spacer(),
    _ChromeButton(icon: session.inputEnabled
      ? Icons.mouse_outlined : Icons.visibility_outlined,
      tooltip: session.inputEnabled ? 'Switch to view-only' : 'Enable input',
      onTap: session.toggleInput),
    _ChromeButton(icon: session.audioEnabled
      ? Icons.volume_up_outlined : Icons.volume_off_outlined,
      onTap: session.toggleAudio),
    _ChromeButton(icon: Icons.apps_outlined,
      tooltip: 'App gallery',
      onTap: () => _openAppGallery(context, session)),
    _ChromeButton(icon: fullscreen
      ? Icons.fullscreen_exit_outlined : Icons.fullscreen_outlined,
      onTap: _toggleFullscreen),
    _ChromeButton(icon: Icons.close,
      tooltip: 'Disconnect',
      onTap: () => _confirmDisconnect(context, session)),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ]),
)
```

**`_ChromeButton`:** `IconButton` with `iconSize: 18`, `color: Colors.white`, `padding: EdgeInsets.all(8)`, `constraints: BoxConstraints(minWidth: 36, minHeight: 36)`.

**`_KeyboardCaptureTag`:**

```dart
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 4),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.85),
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(6)),
  child: Text('Ctrl+Alt to release keyboard',
    style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 10,
      fontWeight: FontWeight.w500)),
)
```

**Keyboard handling:** When `MnrdpView` has focus, all `KeyEvent`s are forwarded to `session.sendInput(...)`. Ctrl+Alt releases keyboard capture and removes the indicator. Tapping outside the view also releases capture.

---

#### 22.52.2 MnrdpAppStreamWindow — Seamless Mode

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/mnrdp_app_stream_window.dart`

In `Seamless` windowing, each remote window is an independent floating widget. The user can drag, resize, minimise, and close individual windows. The remote desktop background is never transmitted.

```dart
class MnrdpAppStreamWindow extends StatefulWidget {
  final MnrdpSession session;
  final MnrdpRemoteWindow window;   // from MnrdpWindowKind.Created
  final Color purposeColour;
  final bool isFocused;
  final VoidCallback onFocus;
}
```

**Layout:**

```dart
AnimatedPositioned(
  duration: Duration(milliseconds: 150),
  curve: Curves.easeOut,
  left: _pos.dx, top: _pos.dy,
  child: GestureDetector(
    onPanStart: (_) => widget.onFocus(),
    onPanUpdate: _handleDrag,
    child: Material(
      elevation: widget.isFocused ? 8 : 2,
      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
      clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
      child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [

        // Title bar
        GestureDetector(
          onDoubleTap: _toggleMaximise,
          child: Container(
            height: 36,
            color: widget.isFocused
              ? widget.purposeColour
              : widget.purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.55),
            child: Row(children: [
              SizedBox(width: 10),
              if (window.icon != null)
                Image.memory(window.icon!, width: 16, height: 16),
              SizedBox(width: 6),
              Expanded(child: Text(window.title,
                style: TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 12,
                  fontWeight: FontWeight.w600),
                maxLines: 1, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis)),
              _WindowControl(icon: Icons.remove,       onTap: _minimise),
              _WindowControl(icon: Icons.crop_square,  onTap: _toggleMaximise),
              _WindowControl(icon: Icons.close, isClose: true,
                onTap: () => session.closeWindow(window.id)),
              SizedBox(width: 4),
            ]),
          ),
        ),

        // Content frame
        SizedBox(
          width: _size.width,
          height: _size.height,
          child: _MnrdpWindowFrame(session: session, windowId: window.id)),

        // Resize handle — bottom-right corner
        Align(alignment: Alignment.bottomRight,
          child: GestureDetector(
            onPanUpdate: _handleResize,
            child: Container(width: 16, height: 16,
              color: Colors.transparent,
              child: Icon(Icons.open_in_full, size: 12,
                color: widget.purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.5))))),
      ]),
    ),
  ),
)
```

**`_WindowControl`:**
```dart
GestureDetector(
  onTap: onTap,
  child: Container(
    width: 22, height: 22,
    margin: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 2),
    decoration: BoxDecoration(
      color: isClose
        ? kSecRed.withValues(alpha: 0.8)
        : Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.2),
      shape: BoxShape.circle),
    child: Icon(icon, size: 11, color: Colors.white)),
)
```

**Modal windows:** `window.is_modal` = true dims the parent window with a `ColorFiltered(colors: [...0.4 black])` overlay. The modal appears on top. The parent cannot receive input until the modal is dismissed. This mirrors the exact behaviour of native modal dialogs.

**Window focus:** Tapping anywhere inside an `MnrdpAppStreamWindow` calls `onFocus()`, which raises the window's z-order in the session overlay stack and sends `MnrdpInput { target_window: window.id, events: [Focus] }`.

**Drag bounds:** Windows cannot be dragged so that their title bar leaves the screen. Minimum visible title bar: 80px must remain on-screen horizontally, and the title bar must not go above y=0 or below `screenHeight - 36`.

**Minimise:** `_minimise()` animates the window to a 0-height collapsed state and adds the window to the session's `minimisedWindows` list. The session taskbar (§22.52.5) shows minimised windows. Tapping restores.

---

#### 22.52.3 AppGalleryScreen

**File:** `features/remote/screens/app_gallery_screen.dart`

Shown when a session opens in `AppGallery` mode, or when the user taps the apps icon in the chrome bar.

**AppBar:**
```dart
AppBar(
  leading: BackButton(),
  title: Column(crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
    children: [
      Text('Apps — ${session.deviceName}',
        style: textTheme.titleSmall),
      Container(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 2),
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(4)),
        child: Text(session.purposeTag,
          style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: purposeColour,
            fontWeight: FontWeight.w700))),
    ]),
  actions: [
    IconButton(icon: Icon(Icons.search), tooltip: 'Search apps',
      onPressed: _openSearch),
    SizedBox(width: 4),
  ],
)
```

**Body:**

```dart
Column(children: [
  // Category filter chips (scrollable row)
  if (categories.isNotEmpty)
    SizedBox(height: 48,
      child: ListView.separated(
        scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16, vertical: 8),
        separatorBuilder: (_, __) => SizedBox(width: 8),
        itemCount: ['All', ...categories].length,
        itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
          final cat = ['All', ...categories][i];
          final selected = _selectedCategory == cat;
          return FilterChip(
            label: Text(cat),
            selected: selected,
            onSelected: (_) => setState(() => _selectedCategory = cat),
            selectedColor: purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.15),
            checkmarkColor: purposeColour,
          );
        },
      )),

  // App grid
  Expanded(child: _filteredApps.isEmpty
    ? EmptyState(
        icon: Icons.apps_outlined,
        title: 'No apps available',
        body: 'This device hasn't registered any apps for streaming.',
      )
    : GridView.builder(
        padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
        gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithMaxCrossAxisExtent(
          maxCrossAxisExtent: 100,
          mainAxisSpacing: 16, crossAxisSpacing: 16,
          childAspectRatio: 0.75),
        itemCount: _filteredApps.length,
        itemBuilder: (ctx, i) => _AppTile(
          app: _filteredApps[i],
          purposeColour: purposeColour,
          onTap: () => _launch(_filteredApps[i])))),
])
```

**`_AppTile`:**

```dart
InkWell(
  borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  onTap: onTap,
  child: Padding(
    padding: EdgeInsets.all(8),
    child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
      Container(
        width: 56, height: 56,
        decoration: BoxDecoration(
          color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
          border: Border.all(
            color: purposeColour.withValues(alpha: 0.2))),
        child: app.icon != null
          ? ClipRRect(borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(11),
              child: Image.memory(app.icon!, fit: BoxFit.cover))
          : Icon(Icons.apps_outlined, size: 28,
              color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)),
      SizedBox(height: 6),
      Text(app.name,
        style: textTheme.labelSmall,
        textAlign: TextAlign.center,
        maxLines: 2, overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis),
    ])),
)
```

**Loading state:** 12-cell shimmer grid while `MnrdpAppListResponse` is pending.

**Launch flow:** Tapping an app fires `session.launchApp(app)`, which sends `MnrdpAppLaunchRequest`. The gallery screen closes and the session overlay activates. A `CircularProgressIndicator` in the session chrome bar spins until `MnrdpWindowKind.AppReady` is received.

---

#### 22.52.4 Purpose Launcher Sheet

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/purpose_launcher_sheet.dart`

Accessible via long-press on the session indicator bar (§22.52.6), or from a dedicated "Switch device" action. Shows all declared purpose devices.

```dart
showModalBottomSheet(
  context: context,
  isScrollControlled: true,
  builder: (_) => DraggableScrollableSheet(
    expand: false,
    initialChildSize: 0.45, maxChildSize: 0.85,
    builder: (_, controller) => Column(children: [

      Padding(
        padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 4, 16, 8),
        child: Row(children: [
          Expanded(child: Text('Open on device',
            style: textTheme.titleMedium)),
          TextButton(
            onPressed: () { Navigator.pop(context);
              // navigate to Infinet Settings tab
              shell.openInfinetSettings(); },
            child: Text('Manage')),
        ])),

      Expanded(child: ListView.builder(
        controller: controller,
        itemCount: purposes.length,
        itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
          final p = purposes[i];
          final isActive = activeSessions.any((s) => s.purposeTag == p.tag);
          final isOnline = p.deviceOnline;
          return ListTile(
            leading: Container(
              width: 40, height: 40,
              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                color: Color.fromRGBO(p.colour[0], p.colour[1], p.colour[2], 1)
                  .withValues(alpha: 0.15),
                borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10)),
              child: Icon(p.purposeIcon, size: 20,
                color: Color.fromRGBO(p.colour[0], p.colour[1], p.colour[2], 1))),
            title: Text(p.displayName, style: textTheme.titleSmall),
            subtitle: Text('${p.deviceName} · ${isOnline
              ? (isActive ? "Active session" : "Available")
              : "Offline"}',
              style: textTheme.bodySmall.copyWith(
                color: isOnline ? colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
                  : colorScheme.outline)),
            trailing: isActive
              ? Container(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 3),
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    color: kSecGreen.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999)),
                  child: Text('Active',
                    style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(color: kSecGreen)))
              : isOnline
                ? Icon(Icons.arrow_forward_ios, size: 14,
                    color: colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant)
                : Icon(Icons.cloud_off_outlined, size: 18,
                    color: colorScheme.outline),
            onTap: isOnline
              ? () { Navigator.pop(context); _openSession(context, p); }
              : null,
          );
        })),
    ])),
)
```

**`_openSession`:** Calls `mislp.requestSession(purposeTag: p.tag)`, which resolves the device (§18.6.3), issues the token, and opens the appropriate session view. If `presentation == RemoteDesktop` or `AppStream`, navigates to `MnrdpSessionScreen`. If `Background`, shows a `SnackBar` confirming the background task started.

**Offline device handling:** Tapping an offline device shows an inline prompt: *"[Device name] is offline. Queue this session request? It will open automatically when the device comes back online."* Two buttons: Cancel / Queue (24-hour TTL).

---

#### 22.52.5 Session Taskbar

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/session_taskbar.dart`

A persistent horizontal strip shown at the bottom of the screen when one or more MISLP sessions are active. Sits above the navigation bar. Each session gets a pill-shaped chip in its `purpose_colour`. Tapping a chip brings that session's windows to front. Long-press reveals a mini action sheet (screenshot, disconnect, full gallery).

```dart
class SessionTaskbar extends StatelessWidget {
  final List<MnrdpSession> sessions;    // active sessions
  final String? focusedSessionId;
  final ValueChanged<String> onFocus;
}
```

```dart
Container(
  height: 40,
  color: colorScheme.surface,
  child: Row(children: [
    SizedBox(width: 8),
    Expanded(child: ListView.separated(
      scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
      separatorBuilder: (_, __) => SizedBox(width: 6),
      itemCount: sessions.length,
      itemBuilder: (ctx, i) {
        final s = sessions[i];
        final focused = s.id == focusedSessionId;
        final colour = s.purposeColour;
        return GestureDetector(
          onTap: () => onFocus(s.id),
          onLongPress: () => _showSessionMenu(ctx, s),
          child: AnimatedContainer(
            duration: Duration(milliseconds: 150),
            padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 6),
            decoration: BoxDecoration(
              color: focused
                ? colour.withValues(alpha: 0.2)
                : colour.withValues(alpha: 0.08),
              borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
              border: Border.all(
                color: focused ? colour : colour.withValues(alpha: 0.3),
                width: focused ? 1.5 : 1.0)),
            child: Row(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
              Container(width: 8, height: 8,
                decoration: BoxDecoration(color: colour, shape: BoxShape.circle)),
              SizedBox(width: 6),
              Text(s.purposeTag,
                style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
                  color: focused ? colour : colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
                  fontWeight: focused ? FontWeight.w700 : FontWeight.w500)),
              if (s.minimisedWindows.isNotEmpty) ...[
                SizedBox(width: 4),
                // Badge showing count of minimised windows
                Container(
                  padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 1),
                  decoration: BoxDecoration(
                    color: colour.withValues(alpha: 0.3),
                    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999)),
                  child: Text('${s.minimisedWindows.length}',
                    style: textTheme.labelSmall.copyWith(
                      fontSize: 10, color: colour))),
              ],
            ]),
          ),
        );
      },
    )),
    // New session button
    IconButton(
      icon: Icon(Icons.add, size: 18),
      tooltip: 'Open another device',
      onPressed: () => _openPurposeLauncher(context),
      padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8)),
  ]),
)
```

**Session menu (long-press):**
```dart
showModalBottomSheet(child: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.apps_outlined),
    title: Text('App gallery'),
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _openAppGallery(session); }),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.open_in_full_outlined),
    title: Text('Fullscreen'),
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _enterFullscreen(session); }),
  ListTile(
    leading: Icon(Icons.link_off_outlined),
    title: Text('Disconnect'),
    textColor: colorScheme.error, iconColor: colorScheme.error,
    onTap: () { Navigator.pop(ctx); _confirmDisconnect(session); }),
  SizedBox(height: 8),
]))
```

---

#### 22.52.6 Session Indicator Bar

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/session_indicator_bar.dart`

A slim persistent banner shown inside `MnrdpView` and `MnrdpAppStreamWindow` when not in fullscreen. Not the same as the taskbar — this is per-session and always inside the session surface.

```dart
// Shown inside MnrdpView chrome (separate from _MnrdpChromeBar)
// and above MnrdpAppStreamWindow title bars in Seamless mode:
// a thin strip at the very top of the screen containing the colour +
// device name, always present, IgnorePointer so it never intercepts input
Container(
  height: 3,
  color: purposeColour,
)
// That's all. Minimal. The chrome bar carries the label.
// In fullscreen this 3px stripe IS the only indicator.
```

For Seamless windowed mode with multiple app windows, the session indicator is the 3px top-edge stripe on each `MnrdpAppStreamWindow` title bar (the title bar is `purposeColour` — it IS the indicator).

---

#### 22.52.7 Module Enable Prompt

**File:** `features/remote/widgets/module_enable_prompt.dart`

Shown when the user tries to initiate a session (from the Purpose Launcher or elsewhere) but the relevant module is disabled (§17.13).

```dart
AlertDialog(
  icon: Icon(Icons.power_settings_new_outlined,
    color: colorScheme.primary, size: 32),
  title: Text('Enable remote sessions?'),
  content: Column(mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min, children: [
    Text(
      'Remote sessions require the ${_moduleName(module)} module. '
      'It's currently off — enabling it will start the '
      '${_moduleDescription(module)}.',
      style: textTheme.bodyMedium),
    SizedBox(height: 12),
    // Resource cost summary
    Container(
      padding: EdgeInsets.all(12),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: colorScheme.surfaceContainerHighest,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8)),
      child: Column(children: [
        _ResourceRow(icon: Icons.memory_outlined,
          label: 'Memory', value: _moduleRamCost(module)),
        _ResourceRow(icon: Icons.bolt_outlined,
          label: 'Background activity', value: _moduleCpuCost(module)),
        _ResourceRow(icon: Icons.usb_outlined,
          label: 'Port bindings', value: _modulePortCost(module)),
      ])),
  ]),
  actions: [
    TextButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pop(context, false),
      child: Text('Not now')),
    FilledButton(
      onPressed: () {
        modules.enable(module);
        Navigator.pop(context, true);
      },
      child: Text('Enable')),
  ],
)
```

`_moduleRamCost`, `_moduleCpuCost`, `_modulePortCost` return plain-language strings from a static map keyed on `ModuleGroup`. Examples: memory = "~8 MB", background activity = "Minimal — only active during sessions", ports = "One port per active session".

---

#### 22.52.8 Navigation and Error States

**Nav flow additions (appended to §22.48):**

```
AppShell
  └── [long-press session indicator / purpose launcher] 
      → PurposeLauncherSheet
          └── [tap purpose] → MISLP handoff
              ├── presentation: RemoteDesktop/AppStream →
              │   MnrdpSessionScreen (full-screen overlay)
              │   └── [apps icon] → AppGalleryScreen (push)
              ├── presentation: Background → SnackBar confirmation
              └── [offline device] → queue confirmation dialog

SessionTaskbar (always visible when sessions active)
  ├── [tap chip] → bring session windows to front
  ├── [long-press chip] → session action sheet
  └── [+ button] → PurposeLauncherSheet
```

**Error states (appended to §22.51):**

| Context | Message | Retry? |
|---------|---------|--------|
| MISLP token rejected | "Couldn't start session — the device declined the request." | Yes |
| MISLP token expired | "Session request timed out. The device may be busy." | Yes |
| Purpose device offline | "Device is offline. Queue the request?" | Queue / Cancel |
| MNRDP connection lost mid-session | "Connection to [device] lost. Reconnecting…" | Auto |
| MNRDP session auth failed | "Couldn't connect — check trust level with this device." | No |
| Module disabled during session attempt | Module Enable Prompt (§22.52.7) | Enable / Cancel |
